name: Peter
subject: biting my nails!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
When I'm worried, I bite my nails. (I've been trying to quit per my wife's repeated requests, but these numbers aren't helping!) |
---

| | | [](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2e5e/7377f838/3cb43689/51f9229d/429384755/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-fightback?refcode=20180621.2nd&amount=10")
---
Peter,

I'm watching our fundraising numbers for this month come in and I'm worried. And when I'm worried, I bite my nails. (I've been trying to quit per my wife's repeated requests, but these numbers aren't helping!)

Republican Rep. Mike Braun is getting a TON of help from national GOP groups, **like a $1 MILLION ad buy from Republican leader Mitch McConnell 's super PAC.**

To be frank, if our grassroots team doesn't step up _this week_ , our own fundraising just won't be where it needs to be. If we stay on this track, McConnell could very well get another reliable Republican vote for the GOP agenda.

**But that doesn 't have to happen, Peter. Will you rush a contribution to give Joe the resources he needs to fight back and BEAT Rep. Braun this November?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $10>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2e5e/7377f838/3cb43689/51f9229c/429384755/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-fightback?express_lane=true&refcode=20180621.2nd&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2e5e/7377f838/3cb43689/51f9229f/429384755/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-fightback?express_lane=true&refcode=20180621.2nd&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2e5e/7377f838/3cb43689/51f9229e/429384755/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-fightback?express_lane=true&refcode=20180621.2nd&amount=50")**
**[Express donate $100>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2e5e/7377f838/3cb43689/51f92299/429384755/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-fightback?express_lane=true&refcode=20180621.2nd&amount=100")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2e5e/7377f838/3cb43689/51f92298/429384755/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-fightback?refcode=20180621.2nd")**
Look Peter, we don't have to match our opponent's money dollar for dollar. But we do need enough to execute every component of our campaign plan -- **otherwise I 'll have to start cutting things from our budget!!**

What would you have me cut from --
* **_Our plan to organize on the ground in every corner of Indiana?_**
* **_The advertising budget?_**
* **_Our voter mobilization program??_**

Don't make me cut the Get Out The Vote program, Peter. **[Chip in to help us fund our plan to take on the super PACs and send Joe back to the Senate!](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2e5e/7377f838/3cb43689/51f9229b/429384755/VEsB/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIyMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-fightback?refcode=20180621.2d&amount=20")**

Thanks,
Peter

**********[**CONTRIBUTE**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2e5e/7377f838/3cb43689/51f9229a/429384755/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-fightback?refcode=20180621.2nd&amount=25")**********
---

|

---

**This is the hard reality, team.**
**If Democrats lose Nevada's Senate race this fall, we have ZERO chance to take back the Senate.**

**And right now, things are not looking good. A recent poll shows us trailing GOP extremist Dean Heller by one point, and last month we fell VERY short of our critical fundraising goal. **

With Trump and McConnell ALL IN to defeat us and protect their Senate majority, we couldn't have picked a worse time to fall behind, **especially with Donald Trump coming for fundraise with Dean Heller THIS WEEKEND**.

**If we don't turn things around immediately, we'll lose this race and miss our one shot to take back the Senate and stop the GOP's disastrous agenda.**

But we just got some great news: A generous group of donors is MATCHING every single donation we receive this week! **So we're counting on top supporters like you to ****give every dollar you can and get it DOUBLED to take back the Senate RIGHT NOW:**

name: Jay Inslee
subject: We're suing Trump for separating families.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Breaking News: Washington is Suing Trump

| | **BREAKING: Washington Sues Trump Administration**

We won't stand silent: Today, Washington is suing the Trump administration over its cruel and inhumane immigration policies.

Stand with us against the Trump administration as they continue to debase our values and leave children traumatized. We must act together now against these actions. Add your name to show the grassroots power behind our lawsuit -- and let's reunite these families.
| [ADD YOUR NAME »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78dbf/2f5ea88d/706288db/2cbcebd0/1219858867/VEsH/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/washington-sues-on-immigration?utm_source=ema_2018-06-21_wa-lawsuit&source=ema_2018-06-21_wa-lawsuit&utm_campaign=wa-lawsuit&utm_medium=ema")
---
Friend,
When toddlers and infants are forcibly separated from their parents and sent far away, something is wrong. When parents are stuffed into cages for indefinite detainment and have no way to find their children, our immigration system is broken.
**This is not who we are.**
Trump's executive order yesterday is not fooling anyone. They say they will only keep families together when they deem it to be "appropriate." They aim to detain children AND their parents, indefinitely. They have no plans to reunite the 2,300 separated children with their parents.
**This is un-American!**
Friend, children should never be bargaining chips to push through destructive border policy. **And that's why we're suing the Trump administration right now.**
[**Trump's immigration policy is rogue, cruel, and unconstitutional. And we're going to put a stop to it. Add your name to show your support for our lawsuit against Trump and his cruel administration.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78dbf/2f5ea88d/706288db/2cbcebd0/1219858867/VEsE/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/washington-sues-on-immigration?utm_source=ema_2018-06-21_wa-lawsuit&source=ema_2018-06-21_wa-lawsuit&utm_campaign=wa-lawsuit&utm_medium=ema")
[ADD YOUR NAME »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78dbf/2f5ea88d/706288db/2cbcebd0/1219858867/VEsF/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/washington-sues-on-immigration?utm_source=ema_2018-06-21_wa-lawsuit&source=ema_2018-06-21_wa-lawsuit&utm_campaign=wa-lawsuit&utm_medium=ema")
---
In such an important, heartbreaking moment for our country, the Trump administration must be held legally accountable for policies that inflict abuse on immigrant children and parents. We must act now to find a solution for this crisis. **That's why we're filing this lawsuit.**
Whatever Trump does next, one thing we know for sure is Washington state will always be among the first to stand up for the people and the values that make our state and our nation an enduring beacon of hope and opportunity.
[**So stand with us against the Trump administration as they continue to debase our values and leave children traumatized. Add your name to show the grassroots power behind our lawsuit -- and let's reunite these families.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78dbf/2f5ea88d/706288db/2cbcebd0/1219858867/VEsC/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/washington-sues-on-immigration?utm_source=ema_2018-06-21_wa-lawsuit&source=ema_2018-06-21_wa-lawsuit&utm_campaign=wa-lawsuit&utm_medium=ema")
[ADD YOUR NAME »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78dbf/2f5ea88d/706288db/2cbcebd0/1219858867/VEsD/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/washington-sues-on-immigration?utm_source=ema_2018-06-21_wa-lawsuit&source=ema_2018-06-21_wa-lawsuit&utm_campaign=wa-lawsuit&utm_medium=ema")
---
Very truly yours,
Jay Inslee

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78dbf/2f5ea88d/706288db/2cbcebd7/1219858867/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). Contributions or gifts to Jay Inslee for Washington are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington

name: Senate Race (via kyrstensinema.com)
subject: from Joe Kennedy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sinema for Arizona
body:
|
---
| | Making sure you saw Joe Kennedy's last message in support of Kyrsten. The stakes are _even higher now_ as we approach our biggest fundraising deadline yet.

Kyrsten has to finish June strong to show she has what it takes to stop Sheriff Joe. Can you chip in today to make sure Sheriff Joe and his friends in D.C. know we won't let them win this seat? **_[http://act.kyrstensinema.com/kennedy](http://act.kyrstensinema. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ks-kennedy?amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Mesa&state=AZ&zip=85214&phone=&occupation=&employer=&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sinema&utm_content=1+-+httpactkyrstensinemacomkennedy&utm_campaign=KS_EM_FR_NO_180621_1_2&source=KS_EM_FR_NO_180621_1_2&refcode=KS_EM_FR_NO_180621_1_2")_**

**Begin forwarded message:**

Team--

As Sheriff of Maricopa County, Arizona, **Joe Arpaio:**
* Oversaw "the worst pattern of racial profiling in U.S. history," according to the US Department of Justice;
* Eagerly promotes the "birther" lie about President Barack Obama;
* Aggressively undermined our basic American values of equity, tolerance, and decency - which he's continued to do daily since voters rejected him in 2016.

**And now Joe Arpaio is running for U.S. Senate.**

**_[Stand with me to stop Joe Arpaio! Chip in $3 now to support Kyrsten Sinema.](http://act.kyrstensinema. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ks-kennedy?amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Mesa&state=AZ&zip=85214&phone=&occupation=&employer=&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sinema&utm_content=2+-+Stand+with+me+to+stop+Joe+Arpaio+Chip+in&utm_campaign=KS_EM_FR_NO_180621_1_2&source=KS_EM_FR_NO_180621_1_2&refcode=KS_EM_FR_NO_180621_1_2")_**

Representing the best of our shared values and ambitions, **Kyrsten Sinema:**
* Worked her way up from homeless youth to college graduate to U.S. Congresswoman;

* Advocates relentlessly for working families, children, and for everyone's shot at the American dream;

* Fights for a future where all Americans are respected and valued.

**[Contribute now to support Kyrsten Sinema for U.S. Senate and to leave Joe Arpaio in the past.](http://act.kyrstensinema. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ks-kennedy?amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Mesa&state=AZ&zip=85214&phone=&occupation=&employer=&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sinema&utm_content=3+-+Contribute+now+to+support+Kyrsten+Sinema&utm_campaign=KS_EM_FR_NO_180621_1_2&source=KS_EM_FR_NO_180621_1_2&refcode=KS_EM_FR_NO_180621_1_2")**

_[If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:](http://act.kyrstensinema. name: The White House
subject: Separation from the facts
body:
Your 1600 Daily:
| | [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=bbd8591a505a8add2fc68f8e33ac2b93f9ac6aad50a190f1baf4c83023dff57df6e5d5cb424675f3b0fa1b007f4b50dd52627633d3a0988c) The White House • June 22, 2018
## Something to share
[ ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=bbd8591a505a8addb7452855192b46e5aec078df4045fd1f43b9c59aacef5a3f6129139f0dfbf9f0815414c611e926e9e0905cbc678e71b0)
## The Day Ahead
| • | President Donald J. Trump will meet with "angel families" whose loved ones have been victims of crime stemming from illegal immigration. [Watch live at 2:30 p.m. ET. ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=bbd8591a505a8add548d6b33a49690459b79de6799f70bc54ce9dc285d2503e852f7146417927905ac3a0208a8cc72fdec3385b647ea1920)
---|---
• | The President and First Lady will attend the U.S. Marine Corps Evening Parade in Washington. [Watch live at 8:30 p.m. ET. ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=bbd8591a505a8add548d6b33a49690459b79de6799f70bc54ce9dc285d2503e852f7146417927905ac3a0208a8cc72fdec3385b647ea1920)

---
|

## 6 months after tax cuts, the real celebration is for America's workers
**Six months ago today** , President Trump signed the Tax Cuts and Jobs Act into law--the first major overhaul of the U.S. tax code since Ronald Reagan's presidency.
**The law made three important changes** to help workers and small businesses. First, it cut how much money the government takes out of Americans' paychecks. Second, it put U.S. employers on a level playing field with foreign competitors. Third, it eliminated dozens of special interest loopholes, raising $4 trillion in revenue by closing the door on corporate accounting tricks.
**Tax cuts are one ingredient** in President Trump's plan to reclaim a strong and prosperous America. After years of slow recovery, former President Obama's economic team set expectations for a new normal of sluggish growth. With the Trump Administration's policies, unemployment has fallen to 3.8 percent, its lowest level in nearly half a century.
[Good news for workers is something everyone, Republican or Democrat, should celebrate.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=bbd8591a505a8add458458927cfd75265c3676a112ab9cc61694e2ebbc41612a888f1285d108902800e47c037a90c1ed5b4b200d40c6071b)

---
|

## First Lady makes a surprise visit to Texas shelter
**First Lady Melania Trump** traveled to McAllen, Texas, yesterday to take part in briefings at a nonprofit social services center for children who have entered the United States illegally. She thanked law enforcement and social services providers for their hard work and asked how the Administration can build upon its efforts to reunite families following [President Trump's executive order](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=bbd8591a505a8addd43593985b9203fbd8d6046ffa68ae6df307be51ff1e8d72928b7bedfa09c83050d8780789c81f5c3cfd4a5cf475839b).
**The President reiterated his call for Congress to act**. "Our First Lady is down now at the border because it really bothered her to be looking at this and to seeing it, as it bothered me, as it bothered everybody at this table," President Trump told his Cabinet. "But we need two to tango. We have 51 votes in the Senate. We need 60."
[See photos from the First Lady's trip to Texas.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=f7ee07f051cee068638cbb784b4f3efd2a51cd132af28a9507f7fc3bb38312ee763cccd41fbcc9b1ae4b85a67ef4e78eb86a621f134059d0)

---
|

## How President Trump is reorganizing the government
**Today's executive branch is not equipped** to meet Americans' 21st century needs. Job seekers have to navigate more than 40 workforce development programs across 15 federal agencies. Small businesses face overlapping bureaucratic certification processes and complicated paperwork challenges whenever they try to work with the government.
**President Trump's reform and reorganization plan** will change that, with the goal of making the federal government more responsive and accountable to the American people. Last year, the President signed an executive order directing the Office of Management and Budget (OMB) to work on a step-by-step plan to reorganize the executive branch. Yesterday, the President discussed key reforms with members of his Cabinet.
[President Trump is making government more efficient, effective, and accountable.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=f7ee07f051cee068e4ce45baffded795240b5b36eec10d2b14e51d891302c8271ee7a0c893bbed4df8c05c0cea1b71fa20b6b63fc6d0998a)
**More** : [Learn more about the government reform plan--and see the OMB's full report.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=f7ee07f051cee06807e772d71bbe1e882ac9f8427577ac54a3312bce92d03635d4aade84ee7e2267c6204d6a46ff2d0c794af1aa5b347842)

---
|

## Photo of the Day
Official White House Photo by Andrea Hanks
**First Lady Melania Trump visits Upbring New Hope Children's Shelter in McAllen, Texas** | June 21, 2018

clean_body: Your 1600 Daily: | | The White House • June 22, 2018 Something to share The Day Ahead | • | President Donald J. Trump will meet with "angel families" whose loved ones have been victims of crime stemming from illegal immigration. ---|--- • | The President and First Lady will attend the U.S. Marine Corps Evening Parade in Washington. | 6 months after tax cuts, the real celebration is for America's workers Six months ago today , President Trump signed the Tax Cuts and Jobs Act into law--the first major overhaul of the U.S. tax code since Ronald Reagan's presidency. The law made three important changes to help workers and small businesses. First, it cut how much money the government takes out of Americans' paychecks. Second, it put U.S. employers on a level playing field with foreign competitors. Third, it eliminated dozens of special interest loopholes, raising $4 trillion in revenue by closing the door on corporate accounting tricks. Tax cuts are one ingredient in President Trump's plan to reclaim a strong and prosperous America. After years of slow recovery, former President Obama's economic team set expectations for a new normal of sluggish growth. With the Trump Administration's policies, unemployment has fallen to 3.8 percent, its lowest level in nearly half a century. | First Lady makes a surprise visit to Texas shelter First Lady Melania Trump traveled to McAllen, Texas, yesterday to take part in briefings at a nonprofit social services center for children who have entered the United States illegally. She thanked law enforcement and social services providers for their hard work and asked how the Administration can build upon its efforts to reunite families following . The President reiterated his call for Congress to act. "Our First Lady is down now at the border because it really bothered her to be looking at this and to seeing it, as it bothered me, as it bothered everybody at this table," President Trump told his Cabinet. "But we need two to tango. We have 51 votes in the Senate. We need 60." | How President Trump is reorganizing the government Today's executive branch is not equipped to meet Americans' 21st century needs. Job seekers have to navigate more than 40 workforce development programs across 15 federal agencies. Small businesses face overlapping bureaucratic certification processes and complicated paperwork challenges whenever they try to work with the government. President Trump's reform and reorganization plan will change that, with the goal of making the federal government more responsive and accountable to the American people. Last year, the President signed an executive order directing the Office of Management and Budget (OMB) to work on a step-by-step plan to reorganize the executive branch. Yesterday, the President discussed key reforms with members of his Cabinet. More : | Photo of the Day Official White House Photo by Andrea Hanks First Lady Melania Trump visits Upbring New Hope Children's Shelter in McAllen, Texas | June 21, 2018 | |

---
| | For Immediate Release: Friday, June 22, 2018
Contact: [Emily Taylor Johnson](mailto:emily@martharoby.com), 334.717.0461

**President Trump Endorses Roby in July 17 Runoff**
**MONTGOMERY, AL** \-- U.S. Representative Martha Roby (R-AL) today received an endorsement from President Donald Trump for her campaign for reelection in Alabama's Second Congressional District.
**President Trump’s endorsement stated:**
“Congresswoman Martha Roby of Alabama has been a consistent and reliable vote for our Make America Great Again Agenda. She is in a Republican Primary run-off against a recent Nancy Pelosi voting Democrat. I fully endorse Martha for Alabama 2nd Congressional District!”
**Representative Roby stated:**

“I spoke to President Trump this morning and thanked him for his endorsement in my primary runoff on July 17. As I’ve said many times, my voting record on behalf of the people of Alabama’s Second District reflects my commitment to a shared conservative agenda with this administration. I’ve enjoyed a positive working relationship with the White House and Republicans in Congress as we fight together to get our conservative priorities over the finish line for the American people." _
###_

name: U.S. Senator Jeff Merkley
subject: Fwd: Add your name → Tell the government to stop separating families
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, [www
body:
Thousands of children have been torn from their parents and there is currently no plan to reunite the families that have been separated.
---
Derek --

There is a catastrophe happening at our southern border right now -- and Trump's executive order doesn't end this humanitarian crisis.

Thousands of children have been torn from their parents and there is currently no clear plan to reunite the families that have been separated.

**It is up to all of us to fight back against the Trump administration's shameful treatment of children and families. Add your name to say you oppose their cruel separation of families at the border.**

[ I'M IN](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405213ce/4067b0a/654e0b81d/7fbc5df7/1802460307/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZtYVhKemRHNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IkRlcmVrIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IldpbGxpcyIsIkpTVmxiV0ZwYkNVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiSlNWNmFYQWxKUT09IjoiMjAxMTIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/families-at-the-border?&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20180622_jm_nd&source=em_20180622_jm_nd&refcode=em_20180622_jm_nd")
Thank you,

Senator Jeff Merkley

\----------Forwarded Message----------
Sender: U.S. Senator Jeff Merkley
Date: Tues, June 19, 2018
Subject: Add your name -> Tell the government to stop separating families

Earlier this month, when I traveled down to our southern border to visit an immigrant detention facility for children, they wouldn't let me inside. They called the police.

It's outrageous to think a U.S. senator would be barred from entering a federal facility to check on the welfare of children. Such visits are essential to make sure we know what's going on in these facilities and that the children's needs are being met.

At a different facility, a border processing center, I did get in and saw a scene that's seared into my mind: young boys and girls who had been ripped away from their parents with no idea when they might see them again.

**The Trump administration is inflicting harm on children as a strategy for deterring others from coming to the U.S.**

They are using children as pawns to deter other immigrant parents -- many seeking asylum to get their families to safety, and out of unthinkable situations like domestic abuse or gang violence. This is morally bankrupt and wrong on every level.

American taxpayers are funding this operation, so each one of us has a stake in how these children are being treated and how this policy is enacted. This is being done in our names.

**We must fight back against the Trump administration's inhumane treatment of children and families. Add your name to say you oppose this cruel policy that separates families at the border.**

[ I'M IN](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405213ce/4067b0a/654e0b81d/7fbc5df4/1802460307/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZtYVhKemRHNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IkRlcmVrIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IldpbGxpcyIsIkpTVmxiV0ZwYkNVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiSlNWNmFYQWxKUT09IjoiMjAxMTIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/families-at-the-border?&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20180622_jm_nd&source=em_20180622_jm_nd&refcode=em_20180622_jm_nd")
Can you imagine coming to a new country seeking asylum from violence, only to have your family torn apart?

Throughout our history, individuals have come here from all parts of the globe to build a better life -- including my own family. As Democrats, we believe that all people deserve to be treated fairly and with dignity -- not have their children ripped away from them.

I want to be very clear: The Trump administration is inflicting harm on immigrant families as a strategy for deterring them from coming to the U.S. They think they can discourage immigrants from seeking asylum by breaking families apart at the border.

Right now it is up to every single one of us to speak out against this assault on immigrant families that thousands of children have already endured.

**[Add your name to condemn the Trump administration's shameful family-separation policies. Tearing apart families at the border is wrong and must end immediately.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405213ce/4067b0a/654e0b81d/7fbc5df5/1802460307/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZtYVhKemRHNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IkRlcmVrIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IldpbGxpcyIsIkpTVmxiV0ZwYkNVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiSlNWNmFYQWxKUT09IjoiMjAxMTIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/families-at-the-border?&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+Add+your+name+to+condemn+the+Trump+admin&utm_campaign=em_20180622_jm_nd&source=em_20180622_jm_nd&refcode=em_20180622_jm_nd")**

Thanks for being a part of this fight and standing up for children,

Senator Jeff Merkley

If you no longer wish to receive emails from the DNC, [**submit this form to unsubscribe**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405213ce/4067b0a/654e0b81d/7fbc5df2/1802460307/VEsC/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+submit+this+form+to+unsubscribe&utm_campaign=em_20180622_jm_nd&source=em_20180622_jm_nd&refcode=em_20180622_jm_nd").

If you'd only like to receive our most important messages, [**sign up to receive less email**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405213ce/4067b0a/654e0b81d/7fbc5df3/1802460307/VEsD/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/less-email-signup?source=email_footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+sign+up+to+receive+less+email&utm_campaign=em_20180622_jm_nd&refcode=em_20180622_jm_nd").

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't your preferred email address, [**update your contact information**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405213ce/4067b0a/654e0b81d/7fbc5df0/1802460307/VEsA/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/update-info-dnc?source=email_footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20180622_jm_nd&refcode=em_20180622_jm_nd"). If you're ready to elect Democrats in all 50 states, [**make a contribution today**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405213ce/4067b0a/654e0b81d/7fbc5df1/1802460307/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dnc-email-footer?refcode=email_footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+make+a+contribution+today&utm_campaign=em_20180622_jm_nd&source=em_20180622_jm_nd"). This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Just reply to this email to send any comments, criticisms, or feedback. Our community management team reads every message from supporters like you. Thanks for supporting our party!

Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible. Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, [www.Democrats.org](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405213ce/4067b0a/654e0b81d/7fbc5dfe/1802460307/VEsO/ "http://www.Democrats.org?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+wwwDemocratsorg&utm_campaign=em_20180622_jm_nd&source=em_20180622_jm_nd&refcode=em_20180622_jm_nd"), and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Team McDaniel
subject: This is important
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Friends of Chris McDaniel
body:
The establishment knows they can’t control Chris, which is why they are terrified of him.

Peter, This end-of-quarter deadline we face is the most important one yet. The establishment knows they can’t control Chris, which is why they are terrified of him. Instead of realizing that Mississippians want a real change, the establishment has relied on smears and fake news to attack our movement. That’s why this deadline is so important: if we can hit our goal and raise $50,000 by June 30, the Washington elite will get to see just how fed up with them we really are... But only if you choose to stand up and fight back. Show the establishment that we aren’t going to sit around and let them control our lives any longer. Chip in $10, $25, $50, or even $100 right now and let your voice be heard! [https://mcdaniel2018.com/contribute/?src=hf_mcdaniel_180621_EOQ2&utm_source=hf&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=180621_EOQ2] CHIP IN $10 [https://mcdaniel2018.com/contribute/?src=hf_mcdaniel_180621_EOQ2&utm_source=hf&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=180621_EOQ2] CHIP IN $25 [https://mcdaniel2018.com/contribute/?src=hf_mcdaniel_180621_EOQ2&utm_source=hf&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=180621_EOQ2] CHIP IN $50 [https://mcdaniel2018.com/contribute/?src=hf_mcdaniel_180621_EOQ2&utm_source=hf&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=180621_EOQ2] CHIP IN $100 [https://mcdaniel2018.com/contribute/?src=hf_mcdaniel_180621_EOQ2&utm_source=hf&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=180621_EOQ2] We can’t stress enough how important this is. The establishment is ready for a fight. If they go unchallenged, they will win in November. No one wants that to happen. We want a Senator who will fight for Mississippi’s conservative values, not bow to the establishment. But we can only beat them with your help. So please chip in right now and fight for the conservative representation that we deserve! [https://mcdaniel2018.com/contribute/?src=hf_mcdaniel_180621_EOQ2&utm_source=hf&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=180621_EOQ2] Thank you, Team McDaniel DONATE [https://mcdaniel2018.com/contribute/?src=hf_mcdaniel_180621_EOQ2&utm_source=hf&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=180621_EOQ2] [https://twitter.com/CMForUSSenate]

body:
The true cost of keeping Tom McClintock in office:

He voted to strip affordable health care from millions, including 300,000 people in our district with pre-existing conditions.

He supported a tax plan that will raise taxes on most Americans and add 1.8 trillion to the deficit.

He wants to pay for that tax cut by gutting Social Security and Medicare.

We can't afford another term of McClintock. We need Jessica Morse fighting for us in Congress. Chip in:

subject: President Trump's visit to Minnesota
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Klobuchar for Minnesota
body:
Hi,

Did you wake up yesterday to the news about President Trump's rally in Duluth? Did you hear about how he's targeting Minnesota?

**Well remember what I 've said all year:** We can't pull the blanket over our heads and hit the snooze button on this election year, we've got to get out there and win.

**Are we going to let the President have the last word in Duluth? No way.**

**Will you make a donation today to help me push back against President Trump 's campaign to target Minnesota? **

_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $15>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=EIvzN5tUgPhOw%2Ff%2By%2FBCXHKeMgZcJj3R)**
**[Express donate $25>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=dAFTFhS%2BFQfd3lLuGaLYw3KeMgZcJj3R)**
**[Express donate $50>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=3QX%2BDPOP0bVNyFmPp2biY3KeMgZcJj3R)**

****[Or, donate a different amount>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=gpxqfyTtw9xS2p8A9Faw0XKeMgZcJj3R)****

Right now it is more important than ever to hang on to our values, remember where we came from, and keep following the North Star.

Here in Minnesota that means hard work, getting things done, and investing in one another.

With your help we'll do it the Minnesota way -- by finding common ground and pushing through the bickering to get things done for people.

**[This is a critical time -- will you make a grassroots donation so we can share our positive message across our state?](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=zVmG1Pzass13rE6rNNsU2nKeMgZcJj3R)**

Amy

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| |
---

### Sharing Our Campaign Goals With The Virginia Young Democrats
###
###
### See more photos on [Facebook](https://act.myngp.com/el/EPgNsEmZOpTZpJrSKp8LP0EC3GQlxlxUJNtVpmi5U9E=/KtVu2tmpa3C4lhE5Bxz2iWFBvLxGm0HbcDrDxGAV5Zc=), [Twitter](https://act.myngp.com/el/EPgNsEmZOpTZpJrSKp8LP0EC3GQlxlxUJNtVpmi5U9E=/24VWyAFhcAfsCRWAnJZvm5NO4cupnwITr1tarKnfJOg=), and [Instagram](https://act.myngp.com/el/EPgNsEmZOpTZpJrSKp8LP0EC3GQlxlxUJNtVpmi5U9E=/qI5YyCerU6M4Fj0JG7EDQM2XGONwe9xcIfNA-m5bPbY=).
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/EPgNsEmZOpTZpJrSKp8LP0EC3GQlxlxUJNtVpmi5U9E=/ZJrw9TTJ3-Z_3iBRwayAGSzjTUsE6M0YXSUrQEeKavA=?refcode=may18news) |
# News
We did it! With more votes than any other candidate in a Virginia Congressional Primary, Abigail won the Democratic nomination for the 7th District with 73% of the vote. The past year has been an incredible journey for the campaign, and we couldn't have done it without all of our dedicated volunteers and supporters. We enjoyed seeing so many wonderful faces at our Election Night Watch Party at The Westin Richmond, and having so many supporters there to celebrate made the experience that much more meaningful. If you weren't able to join us, check out the [photos](https://act.myngp.com/el/EPgNsEmZOpTZpJrSKp8LP0EC3GQlxlxUJNtVpmi5U9E=/pvaLxwjUrkV_3Hn_V1rq6sDykXCmGEcS9wWsMNJ7gzA=?set=ms.c.eJw9U9kNREEI6mjjffTf2GZQ3ycBEXUmXFmyu9RDyH7xcHFxVDv3YjEnkbIYnEXQiy7vAp7r9D16Pr~_En9Bi8lfPfXq24c9Px0~_PN9Rbb32mg29f3AWccnoFljye4f~%3Blb595zz~%3BQ3~%3BKbpwcfr456Wv90Aa7rbwHcO2~%3BG4Dycin56~_Qn9QrdfVL68XYtTE~%3Bq4vIz~_IV~%3B~%3BgJ7t~%3BLCvjjo~%3Be~%3BV690vi4fv4Gv7yM7B88~%3BDk8cvjNv0uj~_K~_rTef0cyf54~%3B5w4dXrih1L87FzYNlcQ4vx899be~%3B79M~_P937KXdCTf~%3BXg4~%3Brl8HJ8YX~%3Bs209o~%3BGN5VexHtRfP~_9V9v6qKe9P1U8O~_Ver49x889v2omgIHLfaXv7ri~_Jz61Zsgr~_f6m7~%3B38Y60mLD~%3Bew9qLPCTT8~_j~%3B3jkl9u~%3BmcPfN68p~%3Bodonh55ff~_XGsf4X70OpsPz3iTOj8a~%3B6w~_~%3B5996.bps.a.653126791689658.1073741842.485980975070908&type=1) and the [video of Abigail's acceptance speech](https://act.myngp.com/el/EPgNsEmZOpTZpJrSKp8LP0EC3GQlxlxUJNtVpmi5U9E=/QcWX7Ft5nGgQXywgpEbl7GdEni2FXe7oVCRWX_LI0A4=).
Our victory last Tuesday, although decisive, was only the first step of a much bigger and more important mission: flipping the 7th District and bringing a much needed change in leadership to Washington. As our campaign grows, we continue to receive more attention and support from those who realize we can win in November. On June 15th, the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee (DCCC) added our campaign to their "Red to Blue" program, making our campaign one of the top-tier races in the nation. This program is highly competitive and having such a distinction means receiving invaluable organizational support and resources.
# Volunteers
Team Spanberger has now grown to over 1,500 volunteers! The determination of our volunteers continues to be the backbone of the campaign, whether it's knocking on doors, making calls to voters, writing postcards. When we win in November, it will be due to their hard work and dedication to our campaign.
If you would like to volunteer, please sign up [here](https://act.myngp.com/el/EPgNsEmZOpTZpJrSKp8LP0EC3GQlxlxUJNtVpmi5U9E=/OzkMEmkXxbUgX-36E-042nm7iOpzIIMw6YQ9h4NXdRI=)!
For volunteer-related questions, please email our Field Director, Karen Mask, at [karen@abigailspanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/EPgNsEmZOpTZpJrSKp8LP0EC3GQlxlxUJNtVpmi5U9E=/GiosZIWh0QfEhtsfDyKIPyNC-b61cntGraSLfg_K-FU=).
# Meet & Greets
In the first eleven months of our campaign, we held 107 meet and greets with neighbors, surpassing our original goal of attending 100 by June 12th. It's been our campaign's priority to be accessible to the community, and meeting voters in living rooms, kitchens, and libraries across the district has been invaluable as we work to understand the concerns and challenges facing people in the 7th.
We're still planning out our summer and fall schedule for events, so please check [here](https://act.myngp.com/el/EPgNsEmZOpTZpJrSKp8LP0EC3GQlxlxUJNtVpmi5U9E=/C3iyuQUacLZEzh7IhcfdUoUJSB8gGTVzzeaevKKipzI=) regularly for updates. If you are interested in attending or hosting an event, please contact Mary Jo at [MaryJo@abigailspanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/EPgNsEmZOpTZpJrSKp8LP0EC3GQlxlxUJNtVpmi5U9E=/zlwW7poTWzQIRCV1YVVR5lOUZzKh6tECCqoaGJVWO_o=).
# In the Media
[Abigail's Acceptance Speech](https://act.myngp.com/el/EPgNsEmZOpTZpJrSKp8LP0EC3GQlxlxUJNtVpmi5U9E=/QcWX7Ft5nGgQXywgpEbl7GdEni2FXe7oVCRWX_LI0A4=)
MSNBC [Interview with Kasie Hunt](https://act.myngp.com/el/EPgNsEmZOpTZpJrSKp8LP0EC3GQlxlxUJNtVpmi5U9E=/gSimQqCGdKxSshCPzxprVSkDNAOFlPug9Iad8XEKsoI=)
Richmond Times Dispatch [Abigail Spanberger Wins 7th District Democratic Primary](https://act.myngp.com/el/EPgNsEmZOpTZpJrSKp8LP0EC3GQlxlxUJNtVpmi5U9E=/n_uoUwKQsq9ple5b1t3msS6YeyLpc7gi_1e_ALYShW8=)
Vox [Women Dominated the Virginia Democratic Primary](https://act.myngp.com/el/EPgNsEmZOpTZpJrSKp8LP0EC3GQlxlxUJNtVpmi5U9E=/eZu6-TqaZGhNuEFb5U-KA-EsdIRRJm7Y40oEhuJFnpI=)
Chesterfield Observer [Blue Heat: Can Spanberger and the Democrats Win Red-Leaning 7th? ](https://act.myngp.com/el/EPgNsEmZOpTZpJrSKp8LP0EC3GQlxlxUJNtVpmi5U9E=/WwlfwTux1W5e6fs2VWUc_ALWSkD4SobnshBu3EwhqrQ=)

See you around the neighborhood, and thank you for your continued support of our campaign!
\- Team Spanberger

---|---

name: PA Senate 2018
subject: too much is at stake -- help us stop the GOP:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6648/51dbcc2a/5e81548/3a40e49/2676452508/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/")

Team -- the key to a Democratic Senate majority runs through Pennsylvania, but we need your help to win it.

The president has made it clear he wants to preserve the Republican majority so he can keep pushing his disastrous, anti-middle-class agenda that's already hurt ordinary Pennsylvanians. And Congressman Barletta, Bob's opponent, is no better: in his first TV ad of this race, he claims he is running for the Senate to "give the president the help he needs."

Republicans are doing everything they can to flip Pennsylvania's only Democratic Senate seat. The president is personally campaigning for his hand-picked candidate, appearing with him at rallies, recording a robocall on his behalf and even calling Bob out on Twitter for voting against the GOP agenda. Bob fights for middle-class families and stands up to the Trump administration when they put corporations before people, but he can't keep doing that if he loses re-election November.

[**_We need to be ready for the president's next move in the Pennsylvania Senate race. Can you chip in $5 today to make sure Bob can fight back against Republican attacks?_**](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180622_fr1_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500") [DONATE](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180622_fr1_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500") In 2016 Congressman Lou Barletta campaigned early and often for then-candidate Donald Trump, and now the president's repaying the favor by telling his rich and powerful friends to go all in against Bob. Just this week, Vice President Pence appeared on local radio and said that "The president and I count our friendship and our support with Lou Barletta as second to none." They are depending on Barletta to flip this seat so he can be a rubber-stamp for them in the Senate. We can't let that happen.

Bob has spent his career fighting for middle-class families and defending the most vulnerable. He works to give Americans with disabilities the help they need, and he continues to fight against GOP efforts to cut Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security. If Bob loses this November, then Pennsylvania loses its check on the most divisive pieces of the Trump administration's agenda and Democrats lose the majority.

[**_Bob wants to keep helping Pennsylvania families, but he needs your help. Can you chip in $5 or more to help defend Bob Casey and keep Pennsylvania blue?_**](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180622_fr1_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500") [DONATE](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180622_fr1_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

| | Bob needs a strong team to help keep this Senate seat blue so he can continue to protect Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security, fight for working families and be a check on the Trump Administration.

Will you make your first donation to help out?
[DONATE](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180622_fr1_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
---

Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc.
---
PO Box 58746, Philadelphia, Pennsylvania 19102

Contributions or gifts to Bob Casey for Senate are not tax deductible.

Bob Casey for Senate appreciates any feedback you might have. [Click here](mailto:info@bobcasey.com?Subject=Feedback) to contact Bob Casey for Senate with any questions, concerns, or ideas. Want to stay updated on the campaign through social media? You can like Bob Casey for Senate on [Facebook](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6648/51dbcc2a/5e81548/3a40e5e/2676452508/VEsP/ "https://www.facebook.com/BobCaseyJr/") or follow the campaign on [Twitter](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6648/51dbcc2a/5e81548/3a40e5f/2676452508/VEsHBQ/ "https://twitter.com/Bob_Casey") or [Instagram](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6648/51dbcc2a/5e81548/3a40e64/2676452508/VEsHBA/ "https://www.instagram.com/bobcaseyjr/"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6648/51dbcc2a/5e81548/3a40e66/2676452508/VEsHBw/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") from Bob Casey for Senate emails.

name: Tina Smith
subject: Even $1
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
It really does matter. | [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4b0ee/c1f7015/6bc652f0/1142cca6/68346569/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-june_eoq?refcode=rtw_20180622_em-A") Friend, Our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline is in EIGHT DAYS -- and we still have to raise $2,614 before the end of the day to stay on track. You know how I always say every dollar counts? It's because I'm serious -- say we raise all but $1 of our goal before our deadline. Republicans won't care! They'll spin it that we simply didn't meet our goal, and it's because Democrats' enthusiasm is dropping off. So that's why I'm asking you to donate right now -- even if it's just a dollar! Because it's the difference between proving them right, or proving them wrong: [**Donate $10 or more right now and let's make sure we prove 'em wrong.**](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4b0ee/c1f7015/6bc652f0/1142cca6/68346569/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-june_eoq?refcode=rtw_20180622_em-A") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4b0ee/c1f7015/6bc652f0/1142cca7/68346569/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-june_eoq?refcode=rtw_20180622_em-A&express_lane=true&amount=10")

You really may not think a few dollars makes a difference, but your few dollars combined with other folks' few dollars is what grassroots fundraising is all about.
It means you own a piece of this campaign -- not the Koch brothers, not shadowy outside groups trying to buy this election -- just you. A mom maybe, or a student. A Minnesotan, or someone outside our state who cares that we have great representation everywhere.
Your donation makes a difference. I promise. And I'm so grateful for every single dollar.
[**Help us close the gap right now by donating $10 or more before our deadline.**](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4b0ee/c1f7015/6bc652f0/1142cca6/68346569/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-june_eoq?refcode=rtw_20180622_em-A")
Thanks so much,
Tina Smith

[Privacy Policy](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4b0ee/c1f7015/6bc652f0/1142ccbe/68346569/VEsHBw/ "https://tinaforminnesota.com/privacy.html")
clean_body: It really does matter. | "" Friend, Our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline is in EIGHT DAYS -- and we still have to raise $2,614 before the end of the day to stay on track. You know how I always say every dollar counts? It's because I'm serious -- say we raise all but $1 of our goal before our deadline. Republicans won't care! They'll spin it that we simply didn't meet our goal, and it's because Democrats' enthusiasm is dropping off. So that's why I'm asking you to donate right now -- even if it's just a dollar! Because it's the difference between proving them right, or proving them wrong: "" If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | | "" | "" | | "" | "" | | "" You really may not think a few dollars makes a difference, but your few dollars combined with other folks' few dollars is what grassroots fundraising is all about. It means you own a piece of this campaign -- not the Koch brothers, not shadowy outside groups trying to buy this election -- just you. A mom maybe, or a student. A Minnesotan, or someone outside our state who cares that we have great representation everywhere. Your donation makes a difference. I promise. And I'm so grateful for every single dollar. "" Thanks so much, Tina Smith ""

name: Debbie Wasserman Schultz
subject: Trump doesn't care
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | As a breast cancer survivor, I know what it's like to have a pre-existing condition. Which is why it is so heartbreaking to see that the Trump administration doesn't want to protect the 130 million Americans like me. The Trump Administration announced that it will not defend protections for Americans living with a pre-existing condition from discrimination at the hands of insurance companies. Trump wants to go back to the way things were -- when everything from mild anxiety, being on birth control, to being over the age of 50 were all "pre-existing conditions" that allowed insurance companies to charge more or deny coverage. We can't allow our health care system to backslide. [**Sign our petition and help defend the 130 million Americans with a pre-existing condition.**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f35/622b7b5b/1b702f7f/307b9ff8/3448624059/VEsH/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e180621b") Thank you. Debbie
---

name: Kamala Harris
subject: Courage and tenacity
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
| [](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a67b/7ab0e2c4/7f9397aa/349b9a1d/416140212/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-0618?refcode=OHQ0622A") Friend, I am writing you today because Ben needs your help right now. Ben's critical primary election is this Tuesday, June 26, and he is in urgent need of resources to get out the vote in this final weekend. [**Can you pitch in $3 or more to Ben 's campaign right now to ensure his grassroots team wins the primary on Tuesday?**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a67b/7ab0e2c4/7f9397aa/349b9a1d/416140212/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-0618?refcode=OHQ0622A") | [CONTRIBUTE NOW »](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a67b/7ab0e2c4/7f9397aa/349b9a1d/416140212/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-0618?refcode=OHQ0622A")
---
Ben is a civil rights leader and organizer who has spent his life bringing people together to advance progressive causes.
**At just 35, he was named the youngest National President and CEO of the NAACP in history -- guiding them through an unprecedented era of growth.**
Under his leadership, the NAACP developed progressive plans to help end mass incarceration and expand civil rights and helped to pass numerous landmark pieces of legislation during President Obama's first term in office.
And as a community organizer, Ben helped lead successful campaigns to abolish the death penalty for children, stop Mississippi's governor from turning a historically black university into a prison, and pass federal legislation against prison rape.
Now he's running to become Maryland's next governor -- and he needs our help:
[**> > Your contribution of $3 could be the difference between victory or defeat for Ben Jealous in Tuesday's primary. Add it before it's too late. << **](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a67b/7ab0e2c4/7f9397aa/349b9a1d/416140212/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-0618?refcode=OHQ0622A")
As you know, every single day we see the damage being done to millions of people by the Trump administration and its allies in local and state government.
From attempts to take away our health care to the human rights abuses happening on our southern border, we know that these midterm elections are about the future of our nation and a referendum on what kind of people we want to be.
More than ever, we need leaders in state government with courage and tenacity to fight for our families and our progressive values.
**You can help Ben Jealous make history.**[**Your contribution of $3 could be the difference between victory or defeat on Tuesday. Add it before it 's too late.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a67b/7ab0e2c4/7f9397aa/349b9a1d/416140212/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-0618?refcode=OHQ0622A")
Ben has a great chance to win his primary on Tuesday and I know if enough of us step up today, there's nothing anyone can do to stop us.
Thanks for all you do.
\-- Kamala

[CHIP IN »](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a67b/7ab0e2c4/7f9397aa/349b9a1d/416140212/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-0618?refcode=OHQ0622A")
---

* * *
PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
---

[Make a contribution to Ben and Susie here](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a67b/7ab0e2c4/7f9397aa/349b9a19/416140212/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bjst_contribute?refcode=emfooter"). Contributions or gifts to Friends of Ben Jealous are not tax deductible.

name: Geoff Burgan, Andrew Gillum for Governor
subject: Back on The Breakfast Club
body:
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb303c/9e00690/46ae42a8/24022a98/214961847/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_180622_Bclub_fnd_gq_act_vid_GB_ettx&source=em18_180622_Bclub_fnd_gq_act_vid_GB_ettx")
Friends --

With less than 70 days until the primary election, Andrew sat down for a second conversation with the nationally-syndicated, world-famous _The Breakfast Club_ radio show to talk about why voting on August 28th is so important for Florida's future.

Andrew has always been honest about the challenges our state faces, and he's the Democrat that we can count on to stand up for our families and our communities -- that's why _The Breakfast Club_ had him back on-air for his second interview. They know, like we do, that he's the Governor our communities need.

He talked about criminal justice reform and how we need to make sure we keep our kids safe in our public schools -- including taking on the ubiquitous access to guns in our society.

**[Watch Andrew's interview on _The Breakfast Club_ about his plans to rebuild Florida as a state that works for everyone, then share it to help spread the word.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb303c/9e00690/46ae42a8/24022a9b/214961847/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-breakfast-club-june?gpsid=13_55_1511&refcode=em18_180622_Bclub_fnd_gq_act_vid_GB_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180622_Bclub_fnd_gq_act_vid_GB_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&noskip=true&utm_content=2+-+Watch+Andrewrsquos+interview+on+The+Brea")**
Thank you,
Geoff Burgan
Communications Director
Andrew Gillum for Governor

[Watch the video](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb303c/9e00690/46ae42a8/24022a9a/214961847/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-breakfast-club-june?gpsid=13_55_1511&refcode=em18_180622_Bclub_fnd_gq_act_vid_GB_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180622_Bclub_fnd_gq_act_vid_GB_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&noskip=true&utm_content=3+-+Watch+the+video")

This race couldn't be closer: A recent poll shows us neck and neck with Donald Trump's anointed candidate in the race that will decide Senate control - so now more than ever, we need every single grassroots Dem to step up and show President Trump we won't back down.
Today, that means giving just $5 to help us pull ahead before President Trump arrives. name: Phil Bredesen
subject: What you had to say
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BREDESEN FOR SENATE
body:
#
Peter --
A few weeks ago, my team emailed a survey to supporters about the issues that matter most in this race. I was not surprised to learn that health care ranked as one of the highest priority issues.
When it comes to health care, Tennesseans face real challenges. Too many working people aren’t able to afford quality health insurance coverage. The opioid crisis is now a full-blown health emergency. And hospitals are shutting down in our rural communities.
**These kinds of health care problems are having a real impact on the lives of Tennesseans.**
Here’s a fresh way to look at the state of our health. The average lifespan of a Tennessean right now is 76.3 years. If Tennessee was a country, we would rank 50th for lifespan in the world. That means in countries like Mexico, Panama, and Albania, where poverty and inadequate health care services are much more common, you can still expect to live longer than you will in Tennessee.
That’s a problem. But when Tennesseans look to Washington to help solve problems like this, too often we’re faced with the partisan rancor and dysfunction that paralyzes Congress.
I’m running for the U.S. Senate because I believe we can fix the mess in Washington -- and I’m committed to working with you to get things done for our state and our country. **So I’m asking:**
[**Can you pitch in $15 to support our campaign to fix Congress? By working together, I know we’ll be able to make our government work for real solutions to our problems.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1469597/7953942/-1065858487?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDhmNDVhNS01Mjc2LWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmIyYjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ELoQFNjdX8rlUPsfktkqJZ7pPwvECtv8B7n9IopHGV4=&refcode=em180622-issues-survey-results-full&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=Peter&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Lebanon&state=TN&zip=37087&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=15&recurring=true)
**[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1469598/7953943/-1065858487?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDhmNDVhNS01Mjc2LWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmIyYjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ELoQFNjdX8rlUPsfktkqJZ7pPwvECtv8B7n9IopHGV4=&refcode=em180622-issues-survey-results-full&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=Peter&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Lebanon&state=TN&zip=37087&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=15&recurring=true)**
By working together, I know we can get Congress focused on solutions — it’s why I’m applying for the job as your next United States Senator, and why I hope I can count on your support.
Thanks for being on our team.
— Phil Bredesen
**[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1469599/7953944/-1065858487?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDhmNDVhNS01Mjc2LWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmIyYjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ELoQFNjdX8rlUPsfktkqJZ7pPwvECtv8B7n9IopHGV4=&refcode=em180622-issues-survey-results-full&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=Peter&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Lebanon&state=TN&zip=37087&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=15&recurring=true)**

name: Mark Osmack Democrat for Congress
subject: Keep families together
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Osmack for Missouri
body:
Stand up for a fair immigration system.
---
| | | | | |
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cx9Bf8xQokh5K34p6Ma5wd8pVZs6REfWdohUjNXTDalhzPo74DW2ylKlR31aF0C-kNwsnNL_vp2LWqyB-SwbTGX1pDYWv2wnviu6-YUGVceYkS3i4NMIGTN0eFuI6Tqe-Ec8dxAicQdZXB9TwX6TkHPNBBBxY7c_4DF2QZOWB0sOHvDqcL7QA_gmY0aedVAUXLjSrQmMWw0=&c=RbKccVVT5BwCIVprjqtOFe0uDHq4AFIL6oBjBFao6KydmB0ekQFN2g==&ch=n7E67SiNweyvf1x2Bx3chQGPOoWuqs8309IFbVVrfVVQQ_L9sTiYiA==)
---
| President Trump's executive order to end family separation at the southern border doesn't fix our broken immigration system. Detaining children and those seeking asylum in our country isn't right. We need solutions that work for our economy and respect human rights-- now and for the future.
Despite constant misinformation that immigrants are a drag on public resources, the fact is that the U.S. is a nation of immigrants, and immigrants are more likely to start businesses--and less likely to commit crimes--than their non-immigrant neighbors. The hate and scapegoating must stop.
We must have the courage to enact policies that keep our nation a land of opportunity:
* Improving our capacity to process asylum requests so that no one's safety and security sits in limbo waiting for a fair hearing
* Comprehensive immigration reform that includes a path to citizenship

I will stand up for people working to build a better life in the U.S. by working with both parties on a permanent fix for Dreamers, asylum seekers, and families.
To enact long-term, sustainable immigration solutions, we must elect leaders to Congress who have the courage to act on tough issues. I pledge to be that leader. Join me by taking action:

name: Jeremy Ring
subject: "Wreck It" Jimmy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/r4Lj8Sp3Qt_UC8f738Tr-dc8jyoFzO32qWofbDMT3Sg=/qxtUMPrlvxiGsiqo5aopON9jgV3MyLFL93PvzJWNgYQ=) Friends and Neighbors -- Well, I just read an **[interesting article in _Politico_](https://act.myngp.com/el/r4Lj8Sp3Qt_UC8f738Tr-dc8jyoFzO32qWofbDMT3Sg=/5uFoFUqJFPJZxRaqqjLQAnPT6-ERCGXK_ZOaJKCV_oo=)**. Reportedly, our current Chief Financial Officer (CFO) **Jimmy Patronis has been using state resources for personal and political activities - including driving his state funded car to meetings with political consultants and, apparently, wrecking it along the way.** What's even worse: Patronis only reimbursed the state for the use of the vehicle after _Politico_ inquired with his office regarding its vehicle-reimbursement policy. What I most want to know: Why are we just now learning about this? Clearly CFO Patronis didn't want the public to know. And if _Politico_ hadn't done the digging, we may never have known. **Using state resources for personal and political activities is an abuse taxpayer funds** \- is exactly the type of behavior that makes Floridians lose confidence in the government. Especially when there are such blatant attempts made to cover it up.** ** [Stop Corruption in the Cabinet. Add your name. ](https://act.myngp.com/el/r4Lj8Sp3Qt_UC8f738Tr-dc8jyoFzO32qWofbDMT3Sg=/5CuXkpbNb4DE8mlQyV0UZo-9Msgn1oCpCGL2Q6n7m3o=?recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com) As someone who is running to replace "Wreck It Jimmy" as your next CFO - and as a fellow tax payer - I am so sick of this kind of total corruption going on in our state government, unchecked. **For this reason, I am calling for a full investigation into CFO Patronis ' use of state resources to ensure that taxpayers aren't paying for the CFO's political activities.** **[Please add your name to join me.](https://act.myngp.com/el/r4Lj8Sp3Qt_UC8f738Tr-dc8jyoFzO32qWofbDMT3Sg=/5CuXkpbNb4DE8mlQyV0UZo-9Msgn1oCpCGL2Q6n7m3o=?recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)** Thank you for everything you do, **Jeremy Ring** | POLITICAL ADVERTISEMENT PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER
---
Jeremy Ring for Florida Chief Financial Officer
PO Box 670311
Coral Springs FL 33067 United States

name: Christina Reynolds, EMILY's List
subject: Republicans' billionaires vs. the EMILY's List community
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILY's List [www
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4032/24c69fd9/19ca7b92e/18806244/1939737430/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFER53N_digital_email_20180622_GOPspending_inact&source=WQEFER53N_digital_email_20180622_GOPspending_inact")
---

Peter,

$1.7 million.

That's how much a group backed by the billionaire Koch Brothers is spending on a single television ad against our candidate for governor of Michigan, Gretchen Whitmer. And she hasn't even had her primary election yet!

When Republicans attack a Democrat before the primary, it's a clear sign they think that Democrat has a good chance to defeat a Republican in the general. And they want to knock the threat out early.

We can't let them get away with sabotaging our candidates.

**[Donate $3 now to help pro-choice Democratic women fight back against every attack from big-spending Republican donors like the Koch Brothers.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4032/24c69fd9/19ca7b92e/18806245/1939737430/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180622_email_GOPspending?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+now+to+help+prochoice+Democrati&utm_campaign=WQEFER53N_digital_email_20180622_GOPspending_inact&source=WQEFER53N_digital_email_20180622_GOPspending_inact")**

It's not just our women like Gretchen who Republican mega-donors are going after -- it's our Senate candidates, too.

Like Sens. Claire McCaskill (MO) and Tammy Baldwin (WI), who are running in critical re-election campaigns in states where Trump won.

The Koch Brothers' network has spent nearly $1.8 million to defeat Claire so far. And they've joined forces with other big spenders to invest nearly $10 million to defeat Tammy.

This is just the tip of the iceberg. The Kochs' network has pledged to spend $400 million this cycle. And casino mogul Sheldon Adelson wrote a $30 million check to keep the House red.

Republicans may have billionaires. But our candidates have us -- a powerful community of millions of people.

**Donate $3 to send our pro-choice Democratic women the support they need to withstand this wave of GOP spending:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Fight-GOP-Spending](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4032/24c69fd9/19ca7b92e/18806246/1939737430/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180622_email_GOPspending?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgFightGOPSpending&utm_campaign=WQEFER53N_digital_email_20180622_GOPspending_inact&source=WQEFER53N_digital_email_20180622_GOPspending_inact")**

Thanks,

Christina Reynolds
Vice President of Communications, EMILY's List

clean_body: We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | "" Peter, $1.7 million. That's how much a group backed by the billionaire Koch Brothers is spending on a single television ad against our candidate for governor of Michigan, Gretchen Whitmer. And she hasn't even had her primary election yet! When Republicans attack a Democrat before the primary, it's a clear sign they think that Democrat has a good chance to defeat a Republican in the general. And they want to knock the threat out early. We can't let them get away with sabotaging our candidates. "" It's not just our women like Gretchen who Republican mega-donors are going after -- it's our Senate candidates, too. Like Sens. Claire McCaskill (MO) and Tammy Baldwin (WI), who are running in critical re-election campaigns in states where Trump won. The Koch Brothers' network has spent nearly $1.8 million to defeat Claire so far. And they've joined forces with other big spenders to invest nearly $10 million to defeat Tammy. This is just the tip of the iceberg. The Kochs' network has pledged to spend $400 million this cycle. And casino mogul Sheldon Adelson wrote a $30 million check to keep the House red. Republicans may have billionaires. But our candidates have us -- a powerful community of millions of people. Donate $3 to send our pro-choice Democratic women the support they need to withstand this wave of GOP spending: "" Thanks, Christina Reynolds Vice President of Communications, EMILY's List "" | EMILY's List is a community of over five million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office. | Paid for by EMILY's List "" and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 1800 M Street NW, Suite 375N, Washington, DC 20036 Thank you for being a supporter of EMILY's List. name: Peter Joffrion for Congress
subject: Don't Wait for November
body:
You’ve been reading the headlines, and by now you know that the November midterm elections matter like never before. Democrats all over the country are organizing a massive effort to flip the House and bring accountability back to Washington. Alabamians in particular need to mobilize NOW to ensure that our voters turn out in record numbers on November 6th. If we are going to win, we must show up at the polls!

[**DON’T WAIT FOR NOVEMBER**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1471056/7960161/-1042528460?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGMzZWYzZi01OTc2LWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmIyYjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Qj6LrQtU4714HU8iDqs8k5HsfFC0A9pwjahxuRjR_g=&emci=9300d084-4776-e811-80c2-000d3a12b2b9&emdi=a8c3ef3f-5976-e811-80c2-000d3a12b2b9&ceid=6984379&am=&smartlinkdata=JmVtPWRwd2lsbGlzNjclNDBnbWFpbC5jb20%3D&tknfa=9KXAdTts3ugY0sJQiZqH9qO-mK5FaPf_1fEHGJVW3WM%3D)

If you want an Alabama that works for all of us, if you want an America that works for all of us, if you care about a functioning representative democracy, please show your commitment today by making [YOUR BEST DONATION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1471058/7960163/-1042528460?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGMzZWYzZi01OTc2LWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmIyYjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Qj6LrQtU4714HU8iDqs8k5HsfFC0A9pwjahxuRjR_g=&emci=9300d084-4776-e811-80c2-000d3a12b2b9&emdi=a8c3ef3f-5976-e811-80c2-000d3a12b2b9&ceid=6984379&am=25&smartlinkdata=JmVtPWRwd2lsbGlzNjclNDBnbWFpbC5jb20%3D&tknfa=9KXAdTts3ugY0sJQiZqH9qO-mK5FaPf_1fEHGJVW3WM%3D). Peter Joffrion for Congress

United States

name: Team O'Halleran
subject: SIGN ON: stand with women's health
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
The Trump Administration just launched yet ANOTHER attack on our health care.
[](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633932/1a8421e1/1a447ecc5/4bb91702/2680805956/VEsH/ "http://www.tomohalleran.com")
---
The Trump Administration just launched yet ANOTHER attack on our health care, team. We've told you about the Administration's recent move to undermine protections for people with pre-existing health conditions. And now they're going after Planned Parenthood and other health care organizations that serve women and families in Arizona. [**Here at Team O 'Halleran, we're firm believers in protecting access to women's health care. Will you join us and call on the Trump Administration to stop this unacceptable attack on women?**](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633932/1a8421e1/1a447ecc5/4bb91703/2680805956/VEsE/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/stopthegagrule/?code=O%27Halleran&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fcontribute%2Fpage%2Fohalleranty2018%3Frefcode%3Dem_ja_2018.06.22_b1_to_all") Organizations like Planned Parenthood provide critical health services to women across Arizona and across the country. Women depend on them for reproductive care, cancer screenings, and more. Our government should stand up for organizations that provide vital health care services -- not make it harder for them to provide women with care. **But under a newly proposed regulation -- called a "gag rule" \-- Planned Parenthood and other providers would lose federal funding unless they withhold certain health care information from patients. ** [**This proposal is nothing short of an attack on women 's health care. Add your voice and call on the Administration to reverse this decision to go after women's health providers >>**](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633932/1a8421e1/1a447ecc5/4bb91703/2680805956/VEsF/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/stopthegagrule/?code=O%27Halleran&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fcontribute%2Fpage%2Fohalleranty2018%3Frefcode%3Dem_ja_2018.06.22_b1_to_all") Thanks, Team O'Halleran | ****[DONATE](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq22018?refcode=em_ja_2018.06.22_b1_to_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****
---

**_**Representative Tom O 'Halleran represents Arizona's First Congressional District in the 115th Congress. As a former police officer, small businessman, and Arizona state legislator, Tom knows what it takes to bring people together and bring positive change to Arizona families. Tom is taking on the tough challenges in Congress by championing ethics reforms and putting problem solving ahead of politics. If you'd like to support Tom's campaign please [click here](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq22018?refcode=footer-bio&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=").**_**
** **

Your grassroots support is critical to helping Tom become a strong voice for all Arizonans. If you'd still like to unsubscribe from our emails, [_click here_](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633932/1a8421e1/1a447ecc5/4bb91708/2680805956/VEsO/ "http://action.tomohalleran.com/unsubscribe").

We've told you about the Administration's recent move to undermine protections for people with pre-existing health conditions. And now they're going after Planned Parenthood and other health care organizations that serve women and families in Arizona. "" Organizations like Planned Parenthood provide critical health services to women across Arizona and across the country. Women depend on them for reproductive care, cancer screenings, and more. Our government should stand up for organizations that provide vital health care services -- not make it harder for them to provide women with care. But under a newly proposed regulation -- called a "gag rule" \-- Planned Parenthood and other providers would lose federal funding unless they withhold certain health care information from patients. "" Thanks, Team O'Halleran | ** "=" Representative Tom O 'Halleran represents Arizona's First Congressional District in the 115th Congress. As a former police officer, small businessman, and Arizona state legislator, Tom knows what it takes to bring people together and bring positive change to Arizona families. Tom is taking on the tough challenges in Congress by championing ethics reforms and putting problem solving ahead of politics. If you'd like to support Tom's campaign please "="._ ** Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress

name: Xochitl Hinojosa
subject: 2,300 children woke up today without their parents
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, [www
body:
Trump's executive order does not reunite families, Derek. Here's what we know now:
---
This week, Donald Trump signed an executive order to try to claim credit for rolling back his own cruel policy of separating immigrant children from their families -- but this fight is NOT over, Derek. Here's what we know as of this morning:
* More than 2,300 children woke up today without their parents -- **and the Trump administration still has no real plan for how to reunite those children with their parents.** Some families are still separated by more than a thousand miles since children were sent to detention facilities in other states while their parents are detained at the border.
* Families could be detained indefinitely and children could still be jailed in cages and tent cities.
* Trump's "Zero Tolerance" policy remains. Parents and children could still be separated from their families while parents are charged and taken to court.
* Trump's executive order does nothing to fix the chaos or the humanitarian crisis at the border that he created.
* Not a single Republican has signed on to the Keep Families Together Act -- legislation that ends family separation and outlines a plan to reunite families.

**If you are angry and want to do something to help reunite immigrant families, add your name to demand Republicans join Democrats and pass the Keep Families Together Act.**

[ I'M IN](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405213c1/4067b0a/6539c3936/7fbc3650/2770973597/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZtYVhKemRHNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IkRlcmVrIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IldpbGxpcyIsIkpTVmxiV0ZwYkNVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiSlNWNmFYQWxKUT09IjoiMjAxMTIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/keep-families-together-act?&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20180622_xh_nd&source=em_20180622_xh_nd")
The Keep Families Together Act is a permanent solution to end family separation and put policies in place to protect families and ensure they are reunited.

Right now the bill is sponsored by every Democrat in the House and Senate, but it's going to require everyone demanding Republicans in Congress take action and pass this bill immediately to reunite families.

**[Add your name to tell Congress to pass the Keep Families Together Act.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405213c1/4067b0a/6539c3936/7fbc3651/2770973597/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZtYVhKemRHNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IkRlcmVrIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IldpbGxpcyIsIkpTVmxiV0ZwYkNVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiSlNWNmFYQWxKUT09IjoiMjAxMTIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/keep-families-together-act?&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+Add+your+name+to+tell+Congress+to+pass+t&utm_campaign=em_20180622_xh_nd&source=em_20180622_xh_nd")**

We will keep you updated and share more information as this situation unfolds. Thanks for being part of this fight.

Xochitl

Xochitl Hinojosa
Communications Director
Democratic National Committee

If you no longer wish to receive emails from the DNC, [**submit this form to unsubscribe**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405213c1/4067b0a/6539c3936/7fbc365e/2770973597/VEsF/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+submit+this+form+to+unsubscribe&utm_campaign=em_20180622_xh_nd&source=em_20180622_xh_nd").

If you'd only like to receive our most important messages, [**sign up to receive less email**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405213c1/4067b0a/6539c3936/7fbc365f/2770973597/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/less-email-signup?source=email_footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+sign+up+to+receive+less+email&utm_campaign=em_20180622_xh_nd").

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't your preferred email address, [**update your contact information**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405213c1/4067b0a/6539c3936/7fbc365c/2770973597/VEsD/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/update-info-dnc?source=email_footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20180622_xh_nd"). If you're ready to elect Democrats in all 50 states, [**make a contribution today**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405213c1/4067b0a/6539c3936/7fbc365d/2770973597/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dnc-email-footer?refcode=email_footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+make+a+contribution+today&utm_campaign=em_20180622_xh_nd&source=em_20180622_xh_nd"). This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Just reply to this email to send any comments, criticisms, or feedback. Our community management team reads every message from supporters like you. Thanks for supporting our party!

Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible. Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, [www.Democrats.org](www.Democrats.org), and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
