name: Joe Donnelly
subject: I've never been afraid of a fight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
Growing up, I was fifth of five kids in an Irish family. In our house, if you weren't ready to scrap, you didn't come to dinner. To this day, I'll work with anyone who wants to help Indiana -- but any |
---

| | Peter,

Growing up, I was fifth of five kids in an Irish family. In our house, if you weren't ready to scrap, you didn't come to dinner. To this day, I'll work with anyone who wants to help Indiana -- but anyone who wants to swing at me or Hoosiers should know I'll be right there to fight back.

And here's something else: I'm used to being the underdog. Six years ago, the pundits thought I didn't have a shot. But in 2012, my team and I fought hard, and with your help, Hoosiers saw that a far-right extremist like Richard Mourdock was the wrong choice to represent Indiana. On election night, we were the ones celebrating.

We're going to have to fight hard again this year. **Mitch McConnell, Paul Ryan, and the Koch brothers are all trying to replace me with an extreme Republican who will do their bidding in the Senate. Will you help me fight, Peter?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $5>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2e5d/7377f838/3cb16f54/51f92349/3803509579/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-putupafight?express_lane=true&refcode=20180622.1nd&amount=5")**
**[Express donate $10>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2e5d/7377f838/3cb16f54/51f92348/3803509579/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-putupafight?express_lane=true&refcode=20180622.1nd&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2e5d/7377f838/3cb16f54/51f9234b/3803509579/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-putupafight?express_lane=true&refcode=20180622.1nd&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2e5d/7377f838/3cb16f54/51f9234a/3803509579/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-putupafight?express_lane=true&refcode=20180622.1nd&amount=50")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2e5d/7377f838/3cb16f54/51f92345/3803509579/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-putupafight?refcode=20180622.1nd")**
I know we can come out ahead again this year. And the truth is, we have to. Because it's clear that Republican Rep. Mike Braun is ready to fall in lockstep with Mitch McConnell and the Republican caucus. He believes that the wealthy (like him) deserve more tax cuts, that it's okay to discriminate based on pre-existing conditions, and that marriage equality should not exist. **But that 's not how he's going to present himself to voters, Peter. If we don't get the truth out, no one will.**

I'm committed to doing every single thing I can to win this race, and that means asking for your donation today. **[Will you help me win in November? I promise you, anything you can give will make a real difference.](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2e5d/7377f838/3cb16f54/51f92344/3803509579/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-putupafight?refcode=20180622.1nd&amount=10")**

With gratitude,
Joe

name: Kathy Manning
subject: 200 days of beating Budd
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
|
---

| | _Kathy Manning is running to represent North Carolina's 13th congressional district. We're building a strong grassroots network to help her defeat Washington 's best special interest ally, Rep. Ted Budd. [**Will you help?**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427867/e3b7d3/5c835664/2555da75/3783813106/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180622#")_ | | | [Donate](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427867/e3b7d3/5c835664/2555da75/3783813106/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180622#")
---
Friend,
200 days ago, all the "political wisdom" said Ted Budd was too entrenched, with too many special interest backers, to be defeated.
200 days ago, this was an underdog race. **And in the time since, we've proven all the naysayers wrong. We 've made this one of the most competitive races in the nation. **
200 days filled with meeting families throughout the district and talking to voters about what keeps them up at night has made one thing clear. The people in this district are tired of having a representative who answers the call of special interests and his party leadership instead of their North Carolina families. Now more than ever, they are ready for change.
Despite the intrusion of Paul Ryan's Super PAC swooping into open an office in our district and the special interest backers like the American Bankers Association running TV ads on Rep. Budd's behalf -- we have continued to gain momentum and energy each day. If we dig in, if we carry our energy and tenacity through November, we CAN win on Election Day.
**This will be a close race. We cannot afford to lose an inch of ground -- and we have a big goal to hit this month.** The FEC deadline is next Saturday, and we have to reach $50,000 by then.
[**Only you can make sure we have the resources to carry us through Election day. Please rush in a contribution before time runs out on this FEC deadline.**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427867/e3b7d3/5c835664/2555da75/3783813106/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180622#")
I know we can do this. Thank you for what you've done so far and sticking with me in this race.
Kathy
| _Kathy Manning is a proud advocate for the families of North Carolina. To her, the cause of making health care more affordable and accessible isn't political -- it's personal. She relies on your contributions to be elected. _ | | [Donate](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427867/e3b7d3/5c835664/2555da75/3783813106/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180622#")
---

|
---

Jacky Rosen is a Democrat running for U.S. Senate in Nevada - our best chance to flip a red seat blue and take back the Senate. We're working hard each day to elect her so she can fight for affordable health care, a cleaner environment, better education and more. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of our grassroots network. Please add us to your address book to make sure you keep receiving updates.

Emails are an important way for us to stay in touch with our supporters. 95% of our contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200 - and without that support, Democrats will lose our best opportunity to take back the Senate this November.

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd710/4fbb2af3/7f69c30c/5e8b9063/2913829281/VEsB/p/eyJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-email?refcode=email_footer&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500"). name: Jeanne Shaheen
subject: unbelievable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shaheen for Senate
body:
This is unbelievable, Friends.
Instead of tackling the issues that could actually save lives, President Trump is spending his time attacking women's rights. Again.
This time, he's pushing a "gag rule" that would defund health care providers like Planned Parenthood that offer women a full range of options for their reproductive care.
**In other words, President Trump 's trying to take away women's right to choose. And I'm sick and tired of it. **
Friends, over 10,000 Granite Staters alone rely on Planned Parenthood for lifesaving services like cancer screenings and prenatal care. So I won't stand by and allow President Trump to close its clinics' doors and rip away women's health care just so he can earn some partisan points.
**If you 're as angry as I am, I need you to sign this petition to join me in fighting for women's reproductive health. **[Add your name right now to tell President Trump: Stop the Title X gag rule!](https://petitions.signforgood.com/stopthegagrule?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=shaheen&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2FCJS-womenshealth%3Fcode%3Djtk860-ja-nd)****
Thank you for taking action,
Jeanne
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Shaheen for Senate email list, please click here.](http://www.democratsenators.org/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=qTL%2F7sh7u8UM%2BUoTYVYRq2j2FvH84umD&url=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.democratsenators.org%2Fo%2F23%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2F%3FEmail%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)
Paid for by Shaheen for Senate
Contributions or gifts to Shaheen for Senate are not tax deductible.

name: Tom Wolf
subject: I'm demanding gun reform. Will you too?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom Wolf for Governor
body:
\-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | Hello --

More than 215,000 students have experienced gun violence at school since the Columbine shooting.

Students should be able to focus on learning and our teachers should be able to focus on teaching. No one should have to worry about surviving the school day.

Recently, Secretary Betsy DeVos told Congress that her school safety commission won't examine how to keep kids safe from the one thing all school shootings have in common: guns.
**[I won't stand for inaction any longer. That's why I'm demanding that Secretary DeVos take school shootings seriously. Will you stand with me?](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ec2ca/73a2bc12/3ba65160/1fcdcd00/121704140/VEsH/ "https://act.makechangewith.us/page/s/tell-devos-take-school-shootings-seriously-wolf?gpsid=14_50_1499&source=em18_180621_dvosja_fnd_gq_act_ettx_WOLF&utm_campaign=em18_180621_dvosja_fnd_gq_act_ettx_WOLF&utm_medium=email&utm_source=twolf&utm_content=1+-+I+wont+stand+for+inaction+any+longer+Tha")** | | [SIGN THE PETITION ->](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ec2ca/73a2bc12/3ba65160/1fcdcd07/121704140/VEsE/ "https://act.makechangewith.us/page/s/tell-devos-take-school-shootings-seriously-wolf?gpsid=14_50_1499&source=em18_180621_dvosja_fnd_gq_act_ettx_WOLF&utm_campaign=em18_180621_dvosja_fnd_gq_act_ettx_WOLF&utm_medium=email&utm_source=twolf&utm_content=2+-+SIGN+THE+PETITION+nbsprarr")
---
Here in Pennsylvania, I'm fighting to make sure we enact targeted measures to improve school safety. And I'm taking real action -- like banning domestic abusers from buying assault weapons.

We need leadership on the national level to take the same action.

We need the Trump administration's school safety commission to start taking this crisis seriously. Lives are at stake, so the need for action is urgent.

That's why I'm asking for your help to put the pressure on Secretary DeVos and the entire Trump administration.

**Please, sign this petition to Education Secretary Betsy DeVos to tell her to start taking school shootings seriously:**

**[https://secure.wolfforpa.com/Tell-DeVos-Take-School-Shootings-Seriously](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ec2ca/73a2bc12/3ba65160/1fcdcd06/121704140/VEsF/ "https://act.makechangewith.us/page/s/tell-devos-take-school-shootings-seriously-wolf?gpsid=14_50_1499&source=em18_180621_dvosja_fnd_gq_act_ettx_WOLF&utm_campaign=em18_180621_dvosja_fnd_gq_act_ettx_WOLF&utm_medium=email&utm_source=twolf&utm_content=3+-+httpssecurewolfforpacomTellDeVosTakeScho")**

Thanks for standing with me,

Tom

Paid for by Tom Wolf for Governor
Contributions or gifts to Tom Wolf for Governor are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to: **dpwillis67@gmail.com**
If that is not your preferred email address, you can update your information [here](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ec2ca/73a2bc12/3ba65160/1fcdcd05/121704140/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://action.wolfforpa.com/changeaddress?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=tomwolf&utm_content=4+-+here&utm_campaign=em18_180621_dvosja_fnd_gq_act_ettx_WOLF&source=em18_180621_dvosja_fnd_gq_act_ettx_WOLF")
We believe that emails are an important way for the campaign to stay in contact with supporters like you. This campaign appreciates any feedback you might have -- positive or negative. [Click here](mailto:info@wolfforpa.com?Subject=Feedback) to contact the campaign with any questions, concerns, or ideas. [Click here](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ec2ca/73a2bc12/3ba65160/1fcdcd04/121704140/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=tomwolf&utm_content=5+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=em18_180621_dvosja_fnd_gq_act_ettx_WOLF&source=em18_180621_dvosja_fnd_gq_act_ettx_WOLF") if you would like to unsubscribe from Tom Wolf for Governor email updates.

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: what's happening at the border
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
- What's happening at the border is horrific and heart-wrenching. Right now, there are over 2,000 kids in government camps, still separated from their mothers and fathers.

And the Executive Order President Trump signed in a dishonest attempt to fix the problem of his Administration's creation? It could allow families to be detained indefinitely.

Senator Heller has the perfect opportunity to stand up to President Trump on behalf of these families with the President coming to Las Vegas this weekend to fundraise for him. Instead, he's refusing to answer whether or not he'll even bring it up.

Many of these families at the border are seeking protection and fleeing extreme violence. Instead of acting with compassion, the Trump Administration ripped children from the arms of their parents and has _no real plan_ for how to reunite them.

[**We must continue to speak out against their relentless attacks on immigrants. I am committed to being a voice for these families. Add your name to mine to take action and demand that the Trump Administration not indefinitely detain families at the border!**](https://secure.rosenfornevada. "https://petitions.signforgood.com/stop_separating_families?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=89053&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=rosen&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Frosen-stop_separating_families%3Fcode%3Djtk779-ja-fl")
The United States has always been a beacon of hope for immigrants looking for a better life. I'm the granddaughter of immigrants. When my grandfather crossed the ocean to come here, it was in search of the American dream. I'll always carry that with me, and it helps to shape the type of Senator I hope to be. This is not the America we hope and strive for.
****[If you're outraged, too: please sign my petition to call on the Trump Administration to end this policy, return the children who remain separated, and demand they do not detain families indefinitely at the border. ](https://secure.rosenfornevada. "https://petitions.signforgood.com/stop_separating_families?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=89053&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=rosen&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Frosen-stop_separating_families%3Fcode%3Djtk779-ja-fl")****
This fight continues. Thanks for taking action,

Jacky

**Rosen for Nevada
PO BOX 27195
LAS VEGAS, NV 89126**

| Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
---
Jacky Rosen is a Democrat running for U.S. Senate in Nevada - our best chance to flip a red seat blue and take back the Senate. We're working hard each day to elect her so she can fight for affordable health care, a cleaner environment, better education and more. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of our grassroots network. Please add us to your address book to make sure you keep receiving updates.

Emails are an important way for us to stay in touch with our supporters. 95% of our contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200 - and without that support, Democrats will lose our best opportunity to take back the Senate this November.

Together, we can take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to receive fewer emails, please [click here](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd711/4fbb2af3/7f669d41/5e8b909c/785585022/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/s/fewer-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support.

subject: truly scary

body:
|
---
| | | "At the beginning of the year, something truly scary happened: Joe Arpaio entered the race for the Arizona Senate seat. Yes, the same Joe Arpaio a Justice Department expert said oversaw 'the most egregious racial profiling in the United States that [he has] ever personally seen.' And **the same sheriff who was found guilty of criminal contempt for violating a court order directing him to stop illegally detaining members of the Latino community.** "

\- Senator Catherine Cortez Masto
---

**We need to do everything we can to make sure Kyrsten can stop Sheriff Joe and win this seat.**

******[Contribute Now>>](http://act.kyrstensinema. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ks-sur-ccm?amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Mesa&state=AZ&zip=85214&phone=&occupation=&employer=&recurring=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sinema&utm_content=1+-+Contribute+Now+gtgt&utm_campaign=KS_EM_FR_WL_180622_2_4&source=KS_EM_FR_WL_180622_2_4&refcode=KS_EM_FR_WL_180622_2_4")******

Kyrsten is facing a huge end-of-quarter filing deadline next week. She must show everyone who's trying to slow her down - from Joe Arpaio to Mike Pence to Mitch McConnell - that she has the grassroots support we need to win in November.

**_[Can we count on you to give $10 or more right now to help Kyrsten meet her $100,000 end-of-quarter goal? This is a critical deadline and we have to prove Kyrsten can go toe-to-toe.](http://act.kyrstensinema. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ks-sur-ccm?amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Mesa&state=AZ&zip=85214&phone=&occupation=&employer=&recurring=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sinema&utm_content=2+-++if+consaddrstateabbr++AZ+Can+we+count+o&utm_campaign=KS_EM_FR_WL_180622_2_4&source=KS_EM_FR_WL_180622_2_4&refcode=KS_EM_FR_WL_180622_2_4")_**

"Kyrsten is a fighter. She knows the value of hard work and what it takes to overcome incredible adversity. We need a person like that in the Senate."

\- Senator Catherine Cortez Masto
---

**_[Will you step up and give $5 or more to help show that we reject Sheriff Joe's dangerous agenda? ](http://act.kyrstensinema. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ks-sur-ccm?amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Mesa&state=AZ&zip=85214&phone=&occupation=&employer=&recurring=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sinema&utm_content=3+-++if+consaddrstateabbr++AZ+Will+you+step+&utm_campaign=KS_EM_FR_WL_180622_2_4&source=KS_EM_FR_WL_180622_2_4&refcode=KS_EM_FR_WL_180622_2_4")_**

Thanks for stepping up.

Team Sinema

[ ](nh.gop)

**NH REPUBLICAN PARTY**
**WEEKLY NEWSLETTER**
**FRIDAY, JUNE 22nd**
|
---
**_A Note From Jeanie_**
Dear Derek,

Last night we had our first candidates’ training at the NH Institute of Politics. With over 60 folks in attendance, the training was a great success. Our next training will be on July 28th in Plymouth, with a final location soon to be announced. If you weren’t able to attend last night, please call our office and sign up for the next training. We want to help you win!
With a record-breaking number of 50+ young Republicans declaring to run this year, and exceeding our goal to fill seats for the 2018 election cycle, we are on a strong path to victory in the 2018 election cycle.
We have the candidates, we have a winning message and a strong NH economy, now we need to make sure to turn out the vote in November. So, if you aren’t running for office, please get involved in one of the campaigns, either House or Senate, Executive Council, congressional, or the Governor’s race. With Republicans working together I know we can achieve victory in November.

Sincerely,

Jeanie
**Join the Grassroots Circle!**

**The Grassroots Circle is a unique way for you to get involved while supporting the Party.**

**Becoming a member couldn't be easier -- join today for as little as $10 per month. There are three levels of support: The Grassroots Supporter, the NHGOP Advocate and the VIP Investor.**
[ **More Information** ](http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=5MdO6cLza2MazVJVOHyurnZ5zJfDwV5-2F8Hl4xre-2BIMt5nd0pHim8EqEA9pV9ZCkm_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30M2BVMfJTzKClXfX7R2NQZ8LqVrb2FatEgdq559kZnDuUpPfcqmWY9aUVDyJ9WmnALOxA2JY3R-2FSrnB4-2BYFEM-2BDXHCRrmNrCkYxwJ1P1ZPCB57GKa6OzpCHp8xsktzg0Zgi-2FkVMwbjrvVweJ8eTL5LkEVzhiTPDUxg9-2Ff6UNST9VQJhm4lBDdRkdcDgMuH5ZhJ9QQX1q95rUgbT1lL5C-2FWX604TWIZS-2FbOm-2B9fu6shZBnslhf6QnsjVEVMl-2Bak-2FXCRp3P2PSxIlngbxqJMAuNUew-3D-3D)
**Intern with the NH GOP!**

**Are you a student or know a student that is interested in Politics?**

clean_body: | | nh.gop NH REPUBLICAN PARTY WEEKLY NEWSLETTER FRIDAY, JUNE 22nd | A Note From Jeanie Dear Derek, Last night we had our first candidates’ training at the NH Institute of Politics. With over 60 folks in attendance, the training was a great success. Our next training will be on July 28th in Plymouth, with a final location soon to be announced. If you weren’t able to attend last night, please call our office and sign up for the next training. We want to help you win! With a record-breaking number of 50+ young Republicans declaring to run this year, and exceeding our goal to fill seats for the 2018 election cycle, we are on a strong path to victory in the 2018 election cycle. We have the candidates, we have a winning message and a strong NH economy, now we need to make sure to turn out the vote in November. So, if you aren’t running for office, please get involved in one of the campaigns, either House or Senate, Executive Council, congressional, or the Governor’s race. With Republicans working together I know we can achieve victory in November. Sincerely, Jeanie Join the Grassroots Circle! The Grassroots Circle is a unique way for you to get involved while supporting the Party. Becoming a member couldn't be easier -- join today for as little as $10 per month. There are three levels of support: The Grassroots Supporter, the NHGOP Advocate and the VIP Investor. Intern with the NH GOP! Are you a student or know a student that is interested in Politics? ** Learn the skills necessary to win elections and meet the Republican leaders that govern our State and write legislation. VESTA ROY APPLICATION DEADLINE SOON! The Vesta Roy Series is seeking a few good Republican women! The program is dedicated to educating and training Republican women to help them to position themselves politically. This year's graduating class is already busy running for office, helping with campaigns, and moving our state forward. Deadline for the next class is June 30. For more information, go to VestaRoy.com or contact Margaret Drye at 603-675-9159 or mdrye@madscape.com. PRIORITIES TAX REFORM SPECIFICS EVENT SPOTLIGHTS UPCOMING EVENTS nh.gop/events nh.gop/events PHOTO OF THE WEEK Our great group of Republican candidates at our first NHGOP State Candidate Training session Thursday night! REPUBLICAN SPOTLIGHT Margaret and Virginia Drye are running as a Mother-Daughter duo for the State House! They are both committed NHGOP candidates who are active in the Vesta Roy Excellence in Public Service program and also are great advocates for expanding school choice and economic opportunity in Sullivan County! Thank you for stepping up and running, Margaret and Virginia! TWEETS** OF THE WEEK Tweet With Us! | | VIDEO OF SENATE PRESIDENT MORSE AT RED TOWN HALL RNC LAUNCHES "PAYCHECK PRESIDENT" WEBSITE House Speaker Gene Chandler Website "FOLLOW" on Twitter "LIKE" on Facebook Senate President Chuck Morse Website "FOLLOW" on Twitter "LIKE" on Facebook Executive Council Website "FOLLOW" on Twitter "LIKE" on Facebook Governor Chris Sununu Web - "LIKE" on Facebook - "FOLLOW" on Twitter - Web - Facebook - Twitter - Chairman Jeanie Forrester "LIKE" on Facebook - "FOLLOW" on Twitter - 10 Water Street, Concord, NH 03301 Phone: tel:6032259341 "tel:6032259341" | Email: mailto:info@nhgop.org "info@nhgop.org" • • mailto:info@nhgop.org "info@nhgop.org" | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Republican Party of New Hampshire 10 Water Street Concord New Hampshire 03301

name: Bob Casey
subject: time to meet?

body:

Exciting news, wanted to make sure you heard:

My colleague Kamala Harris is coming to Philadelphia next month, and I'd like you to join us!

**_[Just chip in $5 or whatever you can to be automatically entered to win a trip for you and a guest -- flights and hotel are on us.](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/meet-kamala-harris-bc4s?refcode=em_20180622_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

Philadelphia in July is something else: it's the birthplace of our democracy after all (and the water ice is pretty good, too). There will be plenty of time to explore the city after you hear from Senator Harris at our women's roundtable. She'll have a lot to say about fighting for middle-class families, women, seniors, workers, students and every American who the Trump administration has left behind -- you don't want to miss it.

I'm sure we'll have time for a quick picture, too.

**I'd really like to see you there, friend -- chip in now to be automatically entered to win:** _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Donate $5 now](https://secure.bobcasey. Bob

P.S.: I double-checked with my staff, and we really are covering your flight and hotel. What a deal! **_[Donate whatever you can to automatically be entered to win.](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/meet-kamala-harris-bc4s?refcode=em_20180622_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

name: =?utf-8?Q?M=C5=A9thoni_Wambu_Kraal=2C_EMILY=27s_List?=
subject: Looking for ideas about how to support candidates this year? Look no further:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILY's List [www
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4019/24c69fd9/19a3d955c/18800772/2379073423/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQENER55N_digital_email_20180622_MediumGuideKicker_inact&source=WQENER55N_digital_email_20180622_MediumGuideKicker_inact")
---

Peter,

If you are feeling passionate about changing the political direction of our country, I wanted to share a project our team rolled out last week -- our brand new **["How to Help a Woman Run" guide.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4019/24c69fd9/19a3d955c/18800773/2379073423/VEsE/ "https://medium.com/how-to-help-a-woman-run?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+How+to+Help+a+Woman+Run+guide&utm_campaign=WQENER55N_digital_email_20180622_MediumGuideKicker_inact&source=WQENER55N_digital_email_20180622_MediumGuideKicker_inact")**

This comprehensive guide covers all the ways you can make an impact this cycle -- whether you have three minutes or three hours to give. And once you've decided how you want to help, we've included a list of our 190+ endorsed candidates with links to connect you to their campaigns.

**Check out the guide for lots of ideas on how you can help women run and win this year:**

**[https://medium.com/How-To-Help-A-Woman-Run](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4019/24c69fd9/19a3d955c/1880076c/2379073423/VEsF/ "https://medium.com/how-to-help-a-woman-run?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpsmediumcomHowToHelpAWomanRun&utm_campaign=WQENER55N_digital_email_20180622_MediumGuideKicker_inact&source=WQENER55N_digital_email_20180622_MediumGuideKicker_inact")**

Thank you,

Mũthoni Wambu Kraal
Vice President of National Outreach and Training, EMILY's List

P.S. If you want more resources like this guide, **[sign up to get updates specifically for people who want to volunteer for pro-choice Democratic women.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4019/24c69fd9/19a3d955c/1880076d/2379073423/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/s/20170130_website_HelpElectAWoman?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4+-+sign+up+to+get+updates+specifically+for+&utm_campaign=WQENER55N_digital_email_20180622_MediumGuideKicker_inact&source=WQENER55N_digital_email_20180622_MediumGuideKicker_inact")**

_\----------Original Message----------
From: Mũthoni Wambu Kraal, EMILY's List
Sent: Fri, June 15, 2018 at 9:04 a.m._

Peter,

Donating money to candidates is important. But so is donating your time.

That's where our "How to Help a Woman Run" guide comes in.

We cover everything, from what to expect when you knock on a door for a candidate to hosting candidate fundraisers and creative ideas for digital organizing.

Whether you have three minutes or three hours to spare, we'll give you something you can do to make an impact this year.

**[Check out the "How to Help a Woman Run" guide.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4019/24c69fd9/19a3d955c/1880076e/2379073423/VEsD/ "https://medium.com/How-To-Help-A-Woman-Run?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=5+-+Check+out+the+How+to+Help+a+Woman+Run+gu&utm_campaign=WQENER55N_digital_email_20180622_MediumGuideKicker_inact&source=WQENER55N_digital_email_20180622_MediumGuideKicker_inact")**

Maybe you're thinking about running in the future or maybe you just want to support the record number of women running this year -- no matter the reason, this guide will teach you how to be the best campaign volunteer possible to help elect more women.

We also want to make sure you can connect with the over 190 pro-choice Democratic women we've endorsed up and down the ticket.

So once you've figured out how you want to contribute to a campaign, you'll find a list in the guide of all our candidates and links so you can get involved with their campaigns.

**Head over to the "How to Help a Woman Run" guide for ideas on how to support a pro-choice Democratic woman this cycle:**

**[https://medium.com/How-To-Help-A-Woman-Run](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4019/24c69fd9/19a3d955c/1880076f/2379073423/VEsA/ "https://medium.com/how-to-help-a-woman-run?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=6+-+httpsmediumcomHowToHelpAWomanRun&utm_campaign=WQENER55N_digital_email_20180622_MediumGuideKicker_inact&source=WQENER55N_digital_email_20180622_MediumGuideKicker_inact")**

Thanks for all you do to make a difference,

Mũthoni Wambu Kraal
Vice President of National Outreach and Training, EMILY's List

|
# EMILY's List is a community of over five million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office.
---

|

name: Florida Democrats
subject: Trump will never stop
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Florida Democratic Party
body:
| **FIRST** it was the travel ban on people from Muslim-majority countries.

**THEN** it was targeting DACA and using DREAMers as political pawns.

**NOW** it's separating children from their families at the border.

**WHEN will it end?

[Trump's cruel and racist immigration policies must be CONDEMNED. Add your name now to join thousands of Americans in rejecting Trump's entire anti-immigrant platform.](http://act.floridadems. "https://act.floridadems.org/page/s/add-your-name-to-condemn-trump-s-immigration-policies?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=1+-+Trumprsquos+cruel+and+racist+immigration&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_PT_180DO_180622_1_1&source=FDP_EM_PT_180DO_180622_1_1&refcode=FDP_EM_PT_180DO_180622_1_1")**
---
Donald Trump's "zero tolerance" policy has resulted in over 2,300 children being separated from their parents over the last month. We've seen the pictures of children in cages and the audio of screaming babies taken from their mothers.

**This should NEVER have happened.**

**We need to make it clear: The family separations at the border are just the latest instance of Trump 's pattern of racist cruelty toward immigrants.** First, it was the travel ban on people from Muslim-majority countries, so he could discriminate against Muslims en masse. Then he targeted DACA in a cynical ploy to use the DREAMers as hostages for the rest of his agenda.
[CONDEMN TRUMP'S IMMIGRATION POLICIES NOW ->](http://act.floridadems. "https://act.floridadems.org/page/s/add-your-name-to-condemn-trump-s-immigration-policies?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=2+-+CONDEMN+TRUMPrsquoS+IMMIGRATION+POLICIES&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_PT_180DO_180622_1_1&source=FDP_EM_PT_180DO_180622_1_1&refcode=FDP_EM_PT_180DO_180622_1_1")
This month he went further than anyone expected and had children ripped from their parents and sent off to detention centers. Many of these children, especially infants and toddlers, have no way of being reunited with their parents.

Trump may have partially reversed on family separation, but we can't stop organizing against his racist policies. That's why we're trying to gain as many signatures as possible in the next 24 hours.

[**We need to CONDEMN Trump 's entire anti-immigrant platform and hold accountable every Republican who supports him or stays silent as he commits these acts of cruelty. Add your name to join us in condemning Trump's immigration policies now.**](http://act.floridadems. "https://act.floridadems.org/page/s/add-your-name-to-condemn-trump-s-immigration-policies?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=3+-+We+need+to+CONDEMN+Trumprsquos+entire+an&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_PT_180DO_180622_1_1&source=FDP_EM_PT_180DO_180622_1_1&refcode=FDP_EM_PT_180DO_180622_1_1")

We have to stop Trump from taking his attacks any further.

Thanks for stepping up.

Florida Democrats

| Paid for by Florida Democratic Party. Not Authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
---

We believe that emails are a vital way for the campaign to stay in direct contact with supporters. Click [**here**](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4bee9/1a5213b3/6d203b65/718aad05/2367110285/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.floridadems.org/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=4+-+here&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_PT_180DO_180622_1_1&source=FDP_EM_PT_180DO_180622_1_1&refcode=FDP_EM_PT_180DO_180622_1_1") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages.

Thanks for your support of Florida Democrats!

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: Betsy DeVos is dropping the ball
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
body:
|
---

| | | Betsy DeVos is dropping the ball when it comes to keeping students safe. [**Stand with me and demand Betsy DeVos studies gun violence in our schools >>**](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b98c/43d8135f/60b4fe11/510096ee/348807948/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHYVhKemRFNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01TVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01pVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3MTAzIn0=/ "https://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/s/study-gun-violence?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=1+-+Stand+with+me+and+demand+Betsy+DeVos+stu&utm_campaign=MH_EM_PT_90DO2_180622_1_1&source=MH_EM_PT_90DO2_180622_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_PT_90DO2_180622_1_1")

* * *

**Did you know the school safety commission established by Education Secretary Betsy DeVos after the Parkland school shooting will not be looking at gun violence as part of its work?

[I'm baffled by her decision, and if you are too, I need your help to address this latest news.](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b98c/43d8135f/60b4fe11/51009711/348807948/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHYVhKemRFNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01TVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01pVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3MTAzIn0=/ "https://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/s/study-gun-violence?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=2+-+Irsquom+baffled+by+her+decision+and+if+y&utm_campaign=MH_EM_PT_90DO2_180622_1_1&source=MH_EM_PT_90DO2_180622_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_PT_90DO2_180622_1_1")**

If we're going to succeed in curbing the gun violence epidemic in the U.S., we have to be able to research it, discuss its role in society, and how we may stop future tragedies from happening.

DeVos' comments are the latest example of some Republicans offering thoughts and prayers to devastated communities before claiming that we cannot do anything about these senseless deaths.

[**I disagree. That 's why I'm calling on DeVos to study the gun violence epidemic as part of her commission on school safety. Will you add your voice with mine and sign my petition today?**](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b98c/43d8135f/60b4fe11/51009710/348807948/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHYVhKemRFNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01TVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01pVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3MTAzIn0=/ "https://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/s/study-gun-violence?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=3+-+I+disagree+Thatrsquos+why+Irsquom+callin&utm_campaign=MH_EM_PT_90DO2_180622_1_1&source=MH_EM_PT_90DO2_180622_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_PT_90DO2_180622_1_1")

How many more tragedies must we face before things change? How many more parents will get a text that their kids are hiding in a classroom? How many more communities will gun violence tear apart before Republicans act?

This commission could be the first step in finding a solution to stop the cycle of gun violence. We must be willing to take this first step if we are ever going to take meaningful action to save lives.

[**I need you to join me and call on DeVos to include gun violence prevention as part of her commission into school safety. Please add your name to the growing list of Americans demanding DeVos change her course immediately.**](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b98c/43d8135f/60b4fe11/51009713/348807948/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHYVhKemRFNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01TVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01pVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3MTAzIn0=/ "https://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/s/study-gun-violence?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=4+-+I+need+you+to+join+me+and+call+on+DeVos+&utm_campaign=MH_EM_PT_90DO2_180622_1_1&source=MH_EM_PT_90DO2_180622_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_PT_90DO2_180622_1_1")

Thank you for standing with me,

Martin

---

| PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
---

Receive this email from a friend? **[Sign up now to join Martin's team!](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b98c/43d8135f/60b4fe11/51009712/348807948/VEsD/ "http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/s/footer-join-martins-team?source=footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=5+-+Sign+up+now+to+join+Martins+team&utm_campaign=MH_EM_PT_90DO2_180622_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_PT_90DO2_180622_1_1")**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Democrat Donnelly's Bad Week
body:
Let's just say that this is has probably been a week that Democrat Joe Donnelly would like you to forget. It actually started last weekend, when... | | |
---
| |
---
| **_Democrat Donnelly's Bad Week_** Let's just say that this has probably been a week that Democrat Joe Donnelly would like you to forget.

The real trainwreck of a week actually started last weekend, when Democrat Donnelly took the stage at the 2018 Indiana Democrat State Convention. As he stepped up, the [Indianapolis Business Journal](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=676e0976c4&e=1acd9bb3d6) noted that Democrat Donnelly “didn’t get the roaring applause that other speakers did." It sounds like even Democrats aren't excited about Donnelly.

And then, when he spoke...Democrat Donnelly confirmed what we've always suspected: He was, in fact, the deciding vote blocking last year's attempt to repeal the disastrous Obamacare law once and for all. As Obamacare [choices become more limited](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a6d220734c&e=1acd9bb3d6) (down from eight health insurers in Indiana in 2015 to just two in 2018) and [premiums keep going up](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=84261ba16c&e=1acd9bb3d6) on Hoosiers, Democrat Donnelly had a chance to correct his bad vote passing Obamacare...and he didn't do it. Instead of accepting responsibility for Obamacare's failure, he has the audacity to [blame President Trump](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=2088719eb8&e=1acd9bb3d6)!

But his bad week doesn't stop there. That's because on Monday, Democrat Donnelly decided to [throw a press conference](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=cbe03247c0&e=1acd9bb3d6) rolling out endorsements from "Republicans"....and four people showed up.

But what's worse is that it's a stretch to really call these four people Republicans. The group even includes one person who compared President Trump's election to 9/11.

I think that St. Joseph County GOP Chairwoman Lynn Fitzpatrick said it best this week in [an interview with ABC 57 in South Bend](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=47c9344993&e=1acd9bb3d6): “I know that people who are really Republicans, who really believe in the conservative principles that are the foundational principles in which the party was built, would not be supporting Donnelly."

Democrat Donnelly had a bad week. But Hoosiers will have a great week in November, when they vote to defeat him. -Kyle Hupfer
---
| |
---
| | **_Governor Holcomb's Week That Was_**
---
|
---
|
---
| **_Another Busy Week!_**
Governor Eric Holcomb had a busy week! On Monday, he [took immediate steps](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b38c4c6b64&e=1acd9bb3d6) to improve our Indiana Department of Child Services (DCS). That's because for him, it's always about "people, people, people" -- especially our most vulnerable children and families.

Following a comprehensive review of the agency, Governor Holcomb announced that Indiana will immediately be allocating an additional $25 million to DCS, which will go toward improving salaries and training opportunities for on-the-ground DCS employees who work with children and families daily.

Governor Holcomb then went to Washington, D.C. to attend the Select USA Summit, where he met with global companies to sell them on doing business in Indiana.

While he was in Washington, he stopped by The White House, when he met with Vice President Mike Pence. Governor Holcomb also had a meeting with President Donald Trump...when the president told him doing a “fantastic job" as our governor. [Check the video out here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=38c02310eb&e=1acd9bb3d6)!
---
|
---
| | **_The Mike Braun Corner_**
---
|
---
| **_Setting The Record Straight_**
Our Republican candidate for U.S. Senate, **Mike Braun, **just launched the second ad of the general election campaign – "Our Story!"

While Democrat Donnelly and other Democrat groups have been spending millions of dollars (in just a few weeks) attacking conservative outsider Mike Braun's character, our Republican nominee is setting the record straight.

In this latest ad, he talks about building his business, which is based in his hometown of Jasper, Indiana, where he's proud to pay nearly double the minimum wage, lead in workplace safety and hasn't increased his employees' health care premiums for 10 years running!

Watch Mike Braun's ad [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d914bdde90&e=1acd9bb3d6)!
---
|
---
|
---
---
|
---
---
| | **_National Day of Action_**
---
| **_Hoosier Republicans Knock on 15,000 Indiana Doors!_**
Last weekend, Hoosiers around the state made National Day of Action a HUGE success! More than 120 Hoosier Republicans knocked on 15,000 doors throughout Indiana, talking to Hoosiers about the issues and our outstanding 2018 statewide ticket!

But it doesn't stop there. The party also hosted 19 Republican Leadership Initiative trainings, helping more Hoosier Republicans build the skills they need to becoming political activists in their communities.

Mark your calendars for next month’s National Weekend of Action – July 27-29! [Read more ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=baf3878e41&e=1acd9bb3d6)[here,](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=82467ded81&e=1acd9bb3d6) and [sign up to participate](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=7728624246&e=1acd9bb3d6) in July's National Weekend of Action here!
---
|
---
| _**News You Can Use**_ **Governor Eric Holcomb** [met with Vice President Mike Pence in Washington, D.C.](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=33cd0b1ca7&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch** [recognizes organizations in honor of Homeownership Month in Indiana](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ef94673c63&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Treasurer Kelly Mitchell** [joined Republicans at Broad Ripple GOP this week](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b048658467&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Superintendent Jennifer McCormick**[provides insight, motivation & inspiration at conference](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c53bb623f1&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Sen. Todd Young **[supports** **](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=9d95485cea&e=1acd9bb3d6)[Alzheimer’s & Brain Awareness Month](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=4b2953d46d&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congresswoman Jackie Walorski**[passes bill to attack the opioid crisis ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=cc3a69071a&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Jim Banks** [passes bill to roll back restrictive agriculture regulation](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b194358224&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Todd Rokita** [spoke about immigration issues](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=6f2fc23b41&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congresswoman Susan Brooks** [works on disclosure issues as chair of House Ethics Committee](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=28f6689a6d&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Luke Messer** [honored 8th graders in his district](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=7bc440d34e&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Larry Buchson** [supports continued efforts combat the opioid crisis](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a9a5a856c4&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | |
---
This week, Governor Holcomb sat down with President Trump during a working lunch to talk about Indiana's success and growth alongside other Republican governors. When it comes to Hoosier job creation and economic development, Governor Holcomb is breaking Indiana records!

President Trump even told Governor Holcomb that he’s doing a “fantastic job!”

Check it out [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=1b07b89637&e=1acd9bb3d6)!

| [Read More](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d8064b6aef&e=1acd9bb3d6 "Read More")
---
| | [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=73b115c4f5&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
Indiana manufacturing employment is now on its ninth consecutive year of growth -- the longest expansion of manufacturing employment in state history!

536,000 Hoosiers work in manufacturing, a 26.2% increase since 2009 (a rate that far exceeds Illinois’ growth rate over that same period!)

Read the full story _[here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b58789044a&e=1acd9bb3d6)_ , and learn more about Indiana's remarkable job growth!

| [Read More](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=2f5a8f1ab3&e=1acd9bb3d6 "Read More")
---
| |
---
Governor Holcomb is leading the attack on the opioid epidemic through a focus on prevention, treatment, and enforcement.

Over the last year and a half, the state has certified 34 new treatment sites with five new opioid treatment programs opening by the end of the month.

[Read this](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=68c29f4b49&e=1acd9bb3d6) Q&A with Governor’s Holcomb’s top official attacking the opioid crisis, and learn about the progress we’re making to help Hoosiers.
| [Read More](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=40876a5ef6&e=1acd9bb3d6 "Read More")

clean_body: Let's just say that this is has probably been a week that Democrat Joe Donnelly would like you to forget. It actually started last weekend, when... | | | | | | Democrat Donnelly's Bad Week Let's just say that this has probably been a week that Democrat Joe Donnelly would like you to forget. The real trainwreck of a week actually started last weekend, when Democrat Donnelly took the stage at the 2018 Indiana Democrat State Convention. As he stepped up, the noted that Democrat Donnelly “didn’t get the roaring applause that other speakers did." It sounds like even Democrats aren't excited about Donnelly. And then, when he spoke...Democrat Donnelly confirmed what we've always suspected: He was, in fact, the deciding vote blocking last year's attempt to repeal the disastrous Obamacare law once and for all. As Obamacare (down from eight health insurers in Indiana in 2015 to just two in 2018) and on Hoosiers, Democrat Donnelly had a chance to correct his bad vote passing Obamacare...and he didn't do it. Instead of accepting responsibility for Obamacare's failure, he has the audacity to ! But his bad week doesn't stop there. That's because on Monday, Democrat Donnelly decided to rolling out endorsements from "Republicans"....and four people showed up. But what's worse is that it's a stretch to really call these four people Republicans. The group even includes one person who compared President Trump's election to 9/11. I think that St. Joseph County GOP Chairwoman Lynn Fitzpatrick said it best this week in : “I know that people who are really Republicans, who really believe in the conservative principles that are the foundational principles in which the party was built, would not be supporting Donnelly." Democrat Donnelly had a bad week. But Hoosiers will have a great week in November, when they vote to defeat him. -Kyle Hupfer | | | | Governor Holcomb's Week That Was | | | Another Busy Week! Governor Eric Holcomb had a busy week! On Monday, he to improve our Indiana Department of Child Services (DCS). That's because for him, it's always about "people, people, people" -- especially our most vulnerable children and families. Following a comprehensive review of the agency, Governor Holcomb announced that Indiana will immediately be allocating an additional $25 million to DCS, which will go toward improving salaries and training opportunities for on-the-ground DCS employees who work with children and families daily. Governor Holcomb then went to Washington, D.C. to attend the Select USA Summit, where he met with global companies to sell them on doing business in Indiana. While he was in Washington, he stopped by The White House, when he met with Vice President Mike Pence. Governor Holcomb also had a meeting with President Donald Trump...when the president told him doing a “fantastic job" as our governor. ! | | | The Mike Braun Corner | | Setting The Record Straight Our Republican candidate for U.S. Senate, Mike Braun, just launched the second ad of the general election campaign – "Our Story!" While Democrat Donnelly and other Democrat groups have been spending millions of dollars (in just a few weeks) attacking conservative outsider Mike Braun's character, our Republican nominee is setting the record straight. In this latest ad, he talks about building his business, which is based in his hometown of Jasper, Indiana, where he's proud to pay nearly double the minimum wage, lead in workplace safety and hasn't increased his employees' health care premiums for 10 years running! Watch Mike Braun's ad ! | | | | | National Day of Action | Hoosier Republicans Knock on 15,000 Indiana Doors! Last weekend, Hoosiers around the state made National Day of Action a HUGE success! More than 120 Hoosier Republicans knocked on 15,000 doors throughout Indiana, talking to Hoosiers about the issues and our outstanding 2018 statewide ticket! But it doesn't stop there. The party also hosted 19 Republican Leadership Initiative trainings, helping more Hoosier Republicans build the skills they need to becoming political activists in their communities. Mark your calendars for next month’s National Weekend of Action – July 27-29! and in July's National Weekend of Action here! | | News You Can Use Governor Eric Holcomb Lt. | | Hi Friend, I'll make this brief: the race for Prince George's County Executive is a close one, who we vote for now will shape the future of our communities. Donna has a bold vision for Prince George's and now we are counting on you to get out and vote in the Primary this Tuesday. [Sign up to volunteer with Team Donna and help get out the vote across the county.](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff39/767134fb/5f483400/43384f92/627619158/VEsE/ "https://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/s/electiondaypolls") When the polls close on Tuesday, be sure to join us for our Election Night Watch Party at Prince George's County Educators' Association (8008 Marlboro Pike, Forestville, MD 20747). [RSVP tonight to reserve your space](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff39/767134fb/5f483400/43384f93/627619158/VEsF/ "https://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/s/election-night-watch-paty"). See you at the polls and we hope you join us on election night! Rahsheim Wright Campaign Manager, Donna for Prince George's

name: Chris Evans, betofortexas.com
subject: It's clear: we're not going to back down. Not with so much on the line.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
#
Hey there, I wanted to make sure you saw this photo:
Beto just got off the stage at the Texas Democratic Party convention in Fort Worth, and he absolutely rocked it. No surprise there!
He spoke about our shared values. How beyond anything that might otherwise divide us, Texans everywhere are ready to unite and get after the big, bold, important work ahead of us. How, together, we're going to ensure we can all see a doctor not as a function of luck or circumstance but as a fundamental right, that we have great public schools where our tax dollars aren't turned into vouchers, that we can each find work with dignity and purpose that pays above a living wage , and that we finally treat everyone with respect.
**The crowd was fired up and ready to get to work on the promises of this campaign. It's clear: Texans aren't going to back down. Not with so much on the line.**
I want to say thank you for being a part of our people-powered movement. Beto couldn't do this without all of us trying to work as hard for him as he works for us. The immense progress we've made so far has been because of grassroots supporters like you never backing down.
**[There's more work to be done, and we can't fall short. Will you step up tonight and commit to making a monthly recurring donation of $3 from now until Election Day? Our average online recurring donation is just $14 -- but any amount you can give will be meaningful to Beto.](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb9219c/3b1d797/7887535b/35a98d80/1456089187/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIzIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bo-180622-convention?refcode=ema180622&amount=3&recurring=true")**[ ](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb9219c/3b1d797/7887535b/35a98d80/1456089187/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIzIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bo-180622-convention?refcode=ema180622&amount=3&recurring=true")
Thanks for being with us every step of the way -- talk soon!
Chris Evans
Beto for Texas
**[Donate $3 a month](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb9219c/3b1d797/7887535b/35a98d80/1456089187/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIzIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bo-180622-convention?refcode=ema180622&amount=3&recurring=true")**

* * *
Paid for by Beto for Texas

But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here.](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb9219c/3b1d797/7887535b/35a98d81/1456089187/VEsA/ "http://action.betofortexas.com/page/s/fewer-emails") [ Click here to update your contact information.](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb9219c/3b1d797/7887535b/35a98d82/1456089187/VEsB/ "https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/s/update-your-information") [Click here to unsubscribe.](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb9219c/3b1d797/7887535b/35a98d83/1456089187/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://secure.betofortexas.com/page/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas campaign, P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923.
